name.zh: SSTI 通用表达式探测

description.zh: 用于识别服务端是否把不受信任输入交给模板引擎求值，并通过多种表达式语法区分潜在引擎类型。
description.en: Identifies whether untrusted input is evaluated by a server-side template engine and uses expression syntax differences to narrow the likely engine family.

overview.zh: 该条面向尚未识别模板引擎的入口，使用无副作用的算术或字符串表达式建立响应基线。重点不是把任何花括号回显都判为漏洞，而是确认输入经过服务端模板编译、求值并影响最终输出，再据此选择对应引擎的后续验证。
overview.en: This entry is for inputs whose template engine is not yet known. It uses side-effect-free arithmetic or string expressions to establish a response baseline. Literal brace reflection is not enough; the evidence must show server-side compilation and evaluation that changes the rendered output.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是应用把用户可控数据拼入模板源码、动态视图名称、邮件模板或报表模板，而不是作为普通变量传递。模板引擎因此把数据解释为表达式；不同引擎的分隔符、类型转换和错误信息不同，单次异常或前端计算都可能造成误判。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is concatenating user-controlled data into template source, dynamic view names, mail templates, or report templates instead of passing it as data. The engine then interprets the input as an expression. Syntax, coercion, and errors differ by engine, so one error or client-side calculation can be misleading.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在授权测试账号下记录原始输入、状态码、响应长度和渲染位置；2. 依次提交互不相同且无副作用的表达式，对比结果是否出现可预测求值；3. 使用错误语法和纯文本对照，确认行为来自服务端模板解析。观察证据应是稳定的计算结果或引擎特征错误；若只是原样回显、浏览器脚本计算或缓存差异，则按假阳性处理。
exploitation.en: 1. Record the baseline input, status, response length, and render location with an authorized test account. 2. Submit distinct side-effect-free expressions and compare whether predictable evaluation occurs. 3. Use malformed syntax and plain text as controls to confirm server-side template parsing. Stable calculated output or an engine-specific error is evidence; literal reflection, browser-side computation, or cache variation is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. 禁止把用户输入拼接为模板源码，统一使用引擎变量绑定；2. 对动态模板、视图名称和模板上传实施固定白名单与最小权限；3. 启用适用的沙箱或受限表达式模式，并移除危险对象；4. 为求值探测、模板错误和异常视图选择建立日志告警及回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Never concatenate user input into template source; use engine variable binding. 2. Apply strict allowlists and least privilege to dynamic templates, view names, and template uploads. 3. Enable an appropriate sandbox or restricted expression mode and remove dangerous objects. 4. Alert on evaluation probes, template errors, and abnormal view selection, and add regression tests.

title.zh: 建立渲染基线

description.zh: 记录普通文本在目标字段中的回显位置、编码方式、状态码和缓存行为，确认请求确实到达服务端渲染路径。
description.en: Record where plain text appears, how it is encoded, the status code, and cache behavior to confirm that the request reaches a server-side render path.

title.zh: 执行多语法无副作用探测

description.zh: 提交通用表达式集合并比较各语法的可预测结果，只把稳定的服务端求值差异作为继续识别引擎的依据。
description.en: Submit the generic expression set and compare predictable results across syntaxes, using only stable server-side evaluation differences to continue engine identification.

title.zh: 排除反射与客户端求值

description.zh: 加入纯文本、错误表达式和重复请求作为对照，排除原样反射、浏览器 JavaScript、缓存及随机响应造成的假阳性。
description.en: Use plain text, malformed expressions, and repeated requests as controls to exclude literal reflection, browser JavaScript, caching, and random responses.

title.zh: 定位模板边界并回归
title.en: Locate and regress the template boundary

description.zh: 确认具体模板入口和引擎后，修复源码拼接点并对同一入口、编码层和错误处理路径增加回归用例。
description.en: After identifying the engine and entry point, remove source concatenation and add regression coverage for the same input, encoding layer, and error path.

review.rationale: 该条是跨引擎的无副作用输入探测集合，属于 Payload，而不是某个外部工具命令。

prerequisites.zh: 可控值进入服务端模板源码或被二次编译的表达式位置，而不是仅作为已绑定变量输出；渲染引擎与版本可确认。
prerequisites.en: A controllable value enters server-side template source or a recompiled expression position rather than being output only as a bound variable, with engine and version confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: 为候选语法准备原样字符串、简单算术和错误表达式三组对照，并保存模板源码、编译调用栈、输出与请求 ID。
prerequisites.en: Literal-string, simple-arithmetic, and malformed-expression controls are prepared for candidate syntax, preserving template source, compilation stack, output, and request identifier.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标服务端模板引擎解析可控表达式并产生与该引擎语义一致的确定 canary 结果，编译/渲染日志可回溯到输入。 假阳性边界：算术文本来自客户端 JavaScript、表达式原样回显、应用预先计算 49、错误页猜测引擎、多个引擎语法碰巧相同或静态扫描命中都不是 SSTI。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target server-side engine to parse the controlled expression and produce a deterministic canary consistent with that engine's semantics, with compilation or rendering logs traced to input. False-positive boundary: Arithmetic produced by client JavaScript, literal expression reflection, an application-precomputed 49, engine guesses from errors, coincidentally shared syntax, or static scanner matches does not prove SSTI.

opsecTips.zh: 通用 SSTI 指纹只使用算术/字符串 canary；出现对象图遍历、配置泄露、文件/网络访问、进程创建、模板缓存污染或 worker 异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: Generic SSTI fingerprinting uses arithmetic or string canaries only; stop on object-graph traversal, configuration disclosure, file or network access, process creation, template-cache contamination, or worker anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试模板和输入记录，清理编译模板/页面缓存与 canary，重启隔离 renderer，并用普通变量回归渲染路径。
opsecTips.en: Delete test templates and input records, clear compiled-template and page caches plus canaries, restart the isolated renderer, and regress the render path with ordinary variables.

name.zh: DOCX 文档主 XML 外部实体注入
name.en: DOCX Main Document XML External Entity Injection

description.zh: 针对服务端解包并解析 DOCX 中 word/document.xml 的场景，验证文档处理库是否禁用了 DTD 和外部实体解析。
description.en: Targets server-side DOCX processors that unpack and parse word/document.xml, verifying whether DTDs and external entity resolution are disabled.

overview.zh: DOCX 实质上是 ZIP 容器，正文位于 word/document.xml。只有后端在预览、转换、索引、查毒或内容提取时重新解析该 XML，恶意实体才可能生效；浏览器下载文件或仅检查扩展名并不能证明存在 XXE。
overview.en: A DOCX file is a ZIP container whose main body is word/document.xml. An entity can matter only when a backend reparses that XML for preview, conversion, indexing, scanning, or extraction. Browser download or extension-only validation does not prove XXE.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自文档处理链允许内部 DTD，并让 XML 解析器解析 file、HTTP 或其他外部实体。上传网关可能先接受文件，随后异步转换服务才触发解析，因此证据必须绑定到具体后台组件、任务时间和输出位置，不能把普通上传成功视为漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the document pipeline permits an internal DTD and lets the XML parser resolve file, HTTP, or other external entities. An upload gateway may accept the file while an asynchronous converter triggers parsing later, so evidence must identify the backend component, job timing, and output location.

exploitation.zh: 1. 制作仅修改 word/document.xml 的最小 DOCX，并保留合法的 ZIP 结构；2. 在隔离环境上传后触发预览或文本提取，记录任务 ID、转换日志和输出；3. 用不存在的实体资源和不含 DOCTYPE 的文档做对照。观察证据是受控标记出现在提取结果或解析日志中；仅有上传成功、通用 500 错误或杀毒告警属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Build a minimal DOCX that changes only word/document.xml while preserving a valid ZIP structure. 2. In an isolated environment, trigger preview or text extraction and record the job ID, converter logs, and output. 3. Compare with a missing resource and a document without a DOCTYPE. A controlled marker in extracted output or parser logs is evidence; upload success, a generic 500, or antivirus detection alone is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在所有 Office 文档解析器中禁用 DOCTYPE、外部通用实体和参数实体；2. 将转换服务置于无网络、只读文件系统和低权限沙箱；3. 解包前后校验文件类型、部件清单、压缩比和大小；4. 监控文档任务的外连、异常实体错误及敏感路径访问，并加入恶意 DOCX 回归样例。
mitigation.en: 1. Disable DOCTYPE declarations, external general entities, and parameter entities in every Office document parser. 2. Run conversion in a low-privilege sandbox with no network and a read-only file system. 3. Validate type, package parts, compression ratio, and size before and after unpacking. 4. Monitor document jobs for egress, entity errors, and sensitive path access, and retain malicious DOCX regression cases.

title.zh: 确认 DOCX 后端处理器

description.zh: 区分文件仅被保存、被异步转换还是被内容提取，并记录实际解析 word/document.xml 的组件和版本。
description.en: Distinguish storage, asynchronous conversion, and content extraction, and identify the component and version that parses word/document.xml.

title.zh: 提交结构有效的实体文档
title.en: Submit a structurally valid entity document

description.zh: 在隔离任务中使用现有 DOCX XML 样例，触发同一预览或索引流程并保留任务关联信息。
description.en: Use the existing DOCX XML sample in an isolated job, trigger the same preview or indexing flow, and preserve job correlation data.

title.zh: 核对输出与解析日志

description.zh: 检查受控标记是否进入提取结果，同时核对实体解析错误、文件访问和网络请求，避免把上传层错误误判为 XXE。
description.en: Check whether the controlled marker reaches extracted output and correlate entity errors, file access, and network requests to avoid confusing upload-layer failures with XXE.

title.zh: 隔离转换链并复测
title.en: Isolate and retest the conversion chain

description.zh: 关闭实体解析并收紧转换容器权限后，以相同文档复测，确认标记不再解析且正常 DOCX 功能保持可用。
description.en: Disable entity resolution, restrict the converter container, and retest the same document to confirm the marker no longer resolves while normal DOCX processing remains functional.

review.rationale: 原 DOCX 集合混合普通资源实体、Gopher、PHP filter/expect、外部参数实体和 XInclude 六种解析边界，必须按机制与运行时拆分并逐行守恒。

prerequisites.zh: 服务端确实解包 DOCX 并用 XML parser 读取 word/document.xml，解析库、DTD/实体配置和异步处理 worker 已确认。
prerequisites.en: The server actually unpacks DOCX and parses word/document.xml with an XML parser, with parser library, DTD and entity settings, and asynchronous worker confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: 使用结构合法的最小 DOCX，只把实体目标改为工作目录内固定 marker 文件；保留 ZIP 成员哈希、任务 ID、文件审计和预览输出。
prerequisites.en: A structurally valid minimal DOCX points its entity only to a fixed marker file in the worker directory, preserving ZIP-member hashes, job identifier, file audit, and preview output.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是处理 word/document.xml 的 worker 打开 marker 文件并把其内容展开到文档模型或派生预览中，文件访问和任务 ID 相互关联。 假阳性边界：DOCX 上传成功、ZIP 中存在 DOCTYPE、客户端 Word 展开实体、预览错误、路径出现在堆栈或安全扫描器识别 document.xml 都不能证明服务端 XXE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the worker parsing word/document.xml to open the marker file and expand its content into the document model or derived preview, correlating file access with the job identifier. False-positive boundary: Successful DOCX upload, a DOCTYPE in the ZIP, client-side Word expansion, a preview error, paths in a stack trace, or scanner recognition of document.xml does not prove server-side XXE.

opsecTips.zh: DOCX XXE 只读取专用 marker，禁止 /etc、proc、凭据或网络实体；出现真实文件访问、外连、解压膨胀、任务堆积或 worker 崩溃时停止。
opsecTips.en: DOCX XXE reads a dedicated marker only and forbids system, proc, credential, or network entities; stop on real-file access, egress, decompression expansion, job backlog, or worker crash.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试 DOCX、解包目录、预览产物和 marker，清空文档队列/对象存储/转换缓存，并重启隔离处理 worker。
opsecTips.en: Delete test DOCX files, extraction directories, previews, and markers, clear document queues, object storage, and conversion caches, and restart isolated processing workers.

name.zh: FreeMarker 模板表达式注入

description.zh: 针对 Java FreeMarker 模板中用户输入进入模板源码的场景，区分普通插值、危险内建函数和类实例化能力。
description.en: Covers Java FreeMarker cases where user input reaches template source, distinguishing ordinary interpolation from dangerous built-ins and class instantiation capabilities.

overview.zh: FreeMarker SSTI 发生在应用动态拼接 FTL 模板或允许不可信主体上传模板时。验证需要结合 FreeMarker 版本、对象包装器、TemplateClassResolver 和模板加载目录，因为同一表达式在受限配置、旧版配置及自定义扩展下的能力完全不同。
overview.en: FreeMarker SSTI occurs when an application concatenates untrusted data into FTL source or lets untrusted users upload templates. Validation must account for the FreeMarker version, object wrapper, TemplateClassResolver, and template loader because the same expression has different capabilities under restricted, legacy, or custom configurations.

vulnerability.zh: 根因不是 FreeMarker 自身存在固定后门，而是数据和模板代码边界被破坏，并且危险 utility 类、对象构造器或自定义方法对模板可见。仅看到 ${...} 原样输出或普通变量替换并不构成代码执行，必须证明攻击者控制的表达式被模板解释器求值。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is a broken boundary between data and template code combined with dangerous utility classes, object constructors, or custom methods exposed to templates. Literal ${...} output or normal variable substitution is not code execution; attacker-controlled expression evaluation must be demonstrated.

exploitation.zh: 1. 先用常量运算确认 FTL 表达式求值并记录模板错误类型；2. 检查模板可见变量、对象包装器和类解析器配置，不直接假设 Execute 或 ObjectConstructor 可用；3. 在隔离环境使用现有样例比较受限与未受限配置。观察证据是可重复的服务端求值或明确的安全策略拒绝；代理改写、静态文本替换和通用 Java 异常属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Confirm FTL expression evaluation with a constant expression and record the template error class. 2. Inspect visible variables, the object wrapper, and class resolver rather than assuming Execute or ObjectConstructor is available. 3. In isolation, compare the existing sample under restricted and unrestricted configurations. Repeatable server-side evaluation or an explicit security-policy denial is evidence; proxy rewriting, static substitution, and generic Java errors are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 永远把用户值作为数据模型变量传入，不拼接 FTL 源码；2. 使用 SAFER_RESOLVER 或更严格的 TemplateClassResolver，并禁止危险 utility 类；3. 限制模板加载位置、上传权限和自定义方法暴露；4. 升级 FreeMarker，记录模板异常并为危险内建函数添加负向回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Pass user values only as data-model variables and never concatenate FTL source. 2. Use SAFER_RESOLVER or a stricter TemplateClassResolver and block dangerous utility classes. 3. Restrict template loader paths, upload permissions, and exposed custom methods. 4. Upgrade FreeMarker, log template exceptions, and add negative tests for dangerous built-ins.

title.zh: 识别 FreeMarker 解析上下文

description.zh: 通过错误签名、响应结构和服务端配置确认输入确实进入 FTL 源码，而不是普通变量数据绑定。
description.en: Use error signatures, response structure, and server configuration to confirm that input reaches FTL source rather than ordinary variable data binding.

title.zh: 验证类解析器边界

description.zh: 在隔离模板中提交现有 FreeMarker 样例，观察危险 utility 类是否被解析、拒绝或根本不可见。
description.en: Submit the existing FreeMarker sample in an isolated template and observe whether dangerous utility classes resolve, are denied, or remain unavailable.

title.zh: 关联模板配置证据

description.zh: 把求值结果与 ObjectWrapper、TemplateClassResolver、共享变量和版本配置对应，排除仅由静态替换造成的表象。
description.en: Map evaluation results to the ObjectWrapper, TemplateClassResolver, shared variables, and version configuration, excluding static substitution artifacts.

title.zh: 收紧 FTL 能力并回归

description.zh: 取消源码拼接、限制模板来源和类解析能力后复测常量表达式与危险类，确认业务模板正常且越界能力消失。
description.en: Remove source concatenation, restrict template sources and class resolution, then retest constants and dangerous classes to confirm business templates work without boundary escape.

review.rationale: 该条包含 FreeMarker 模板表达式，应保留为引擎专属 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 不可信输入被拼入 FreeMarker 模板源码，Configuration 版本、TemplateClassResolver、api_builtin_enabled 和对象包装器策略可核验。
prerequisites.en: Untrusted input is concatenated into FreeMarker template source, with Configuration version, TemplateClassResolver, api_builtin_enabled, and object-wrapper policy verifiable.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离配置注册只返回固定 canary 的测试 directive/model，并跟踪模板编译、?new/type resolution 与方法调用；不执行 Execute/ProcessBuilder。
prerequisites.en: An isolated configuration registers a test directive or model returning only a fixed canary and traces template compilation, ?new or type resolution, and method calls without executing Execute or ProcessBuilder.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标 FreeMarker evaluator 将可控语法编译为表达式，并突破预期数据模型范围调用测试 directive/model 产生 canary，调用栈可定位。 假阳性边界：${...} 正常变量插值、?new 被策略拒绝、Execute 类不在 resolver、模板语法错误、命令字符串被回显或本地 FreeMarker PoC 有效均不是目标 RCE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target FreeMarker evaluator to compile controlled syntax and exceed the intended data-model scope by invoking the test directive or model to produce a canary, with a traceable call stack. False-positive boundary: Normal ${...} variable interpolation, policy rejection of ?new, Execute absent from the resolver, template syntax errors, reflected command text, or a local FreeMarker proof does not prove target RCE.

opsecTips.zh: FreeMarker 验证禁止执行原 Execute/ProcessBuilder 命令或访问真实数据模型；出现进程、反射、文件/网络副作用、模板全局修改或线程异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: FreeMarker validation never executes source Execute or ProcessBuilder commands or accesses real data models; stop on processes, reflection, file or network effects, global template mutation, or thread anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 移除测试 directive/model 和模板，清理 FreeMarker 模板缓存与 canary，恢复 resolver/object-wrapper 配置并重启测试应用。
opsecTips.en: Remove test directives, models, and templates, clear FreeMarker template caches and canaries, restore resolver and object-wrapper configuration, and restart the test application.

name.zh: Jinja2 / Flask 模板注入

description.zh: 覆盖 Flask/Jinja2 中模板源码拼接、对象图暴露和沙箱边界验证，强调区分普通变量渲染与表达式执行。
description.en: Covers template-source concatenation, object-graph exposure, and sandbox boundaries in Flask/Jinja2 while distinguishing normal variable rendering from expression execution.

overview.zh: Jinja2 条目用于确认 Flask 或其他 Python 服务是否把输入当作模板源码执行，以及模板上下文是否暴露 request、config、全局函数或 Python 对象图。不同版本、SandboxedEnvironment、自定义过滤器和上下文变量会显著改变可达能力。
overview.en: This Jinja2 entry determines whether a Flask or other Python service executes input as template source and whether the context exposes request, config, global functions, or the Python object graph. Versions, SandboxedEnvironment, custom filters, and context variables materially change reachability.

vulnerability.zh: 根因通常是 render_template_string、字符串拼接或可编辑模板把不可信内容送入编译阶段。Jinja2 的表达式可沿对象属性和全局变量访问敏感能力，但是否可达取决于沙箱、属性检查和上下文；显示 `{{7*7}}` 字面量或前端替换不能证明 SSTI。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is commonly render_template_string, string concatenation, or editable templates feeding untrusted content into compilation. Jinja2 expressions may traverse attributes and globals, but reachability depends on sandboxing, attribute checks, and context. Literal `{{7*7}}` output or client-side substitution does not prove SSTI.

exploitation.zh: 1. 用常量表达式和随机标记确认服务端求值位置；2. 逐步检查 config、request 或安全的对象属性是否可见，记录被拒绝的属性和异常类型；3. 仅在隔离环境运行现有对象图样例，并以纯文本和禁用模板编译的响应作对照。观察证据是重复一致的模板结果或 Jinja2 特征异常；调试页残留、浏览器 DOM 变化和缓存命中属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Use a constant expression and random marker to locate server-side evaluation. 2. Incrementally check whether config, request, or safe object attributes are visible and record denied attributes and exception types. 3. Run the existing object-graph sample only in isolation and compare it with plain text and a response where template compilation is disabled. Repeatable template output or Jinja2-specific exceptions are evidence; stale debug pages, DOM changes, and cache hits are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用固定模板文件和变量绑定，禁止用户输入进入模板源码；2. 在必须支持用户模板时采用 SandboxedEnvironment、严格属性策略和最小上下文；3. 不向模板暴露应用对象、配置、请求全局或危险过滤器；4. 关闭生产调试信息，升级 Jinja2/Flask，并对属性遍历和全局访问建立测试与告警。
mitigation.en: 1. Use fixed template files and variable binding so user input never becomes template source. 2. If user templates are required, use SandboxedEnvironment, strict attribute policy, and a minimal context. 3. Do not expose application objects, configuration, request globals, or dangerous filters. 4. Disable production debug output, update Jinja2 and Flask, and test and alert on attribute traversal and global access.

title.zh: 确认 Jinja2 求值入口

description.zh: 以唯一常量表达式定位具体参数、模板和响应片段，并确认求值发生在服务器而非浏览器。
description.en: Use a unique constant expression to identify the parameter, template, and response fragment, confirming evaluation occurs on the server rather than in the browser.

title.zh: 测试上下文与沙箱边界

description.zh: 在隔离实例提交现有 Jinja2 样例，记录 config、request、对象属性及危险调用分别是可见、被拒绝还是未定义。
description.en: Submit the existing Jinja2 sample to an isolated instance and record whether config, request, object attributes, and dangerous calls are visible, denied, or undefined.

title.zh: 排除调试页与静态回显
title.en: Exclude debug pages and static reflection

description.zh: 使用关闭调试、纯文本和错误表达式三组对照，确保观察结果不是历史调试页、字符串替换或缓存内容。
description.en: Use debug-disabled, plain-text, and malformed-expression controls to ensure the observation is not a stale debug page, string replacement, or cached content.

title.zh: 最小化模板上下文

description.zh: 迁移到固定模板和变量绑定，收紧属性访问后重复同一测试，确认正常渲染保留而对象图路径失效。
description.en: Move to fixed templates and variable binding, tighten attribute access, and repeat the test to confirm normal rendering remains while object-graph paths fail.

review.rationale: 内容是 Jinja2 表达式与对象图输入集合，属于 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: Flask 应用把不可信值拼接到 Jinja2 模板源码或 render_template_string，而不是通过模板变量安全绑定；Environment 类型可确认。
prerequisites.en: A Flask application concatenates an untrusted value into Jinja2 source or render_template_string rather than safely binding it as a variable, with Environment type confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: 使用隔离 Flask fixture 和只返回固定 canary 的测试对象，记录 Environment/SandboxedEnvironment、globals、Undefined 行为与 render 调用栈。
prerequisites.en: An isolated Flask fixture and test object returning only a fixed canary record Environment or SandboxedEnvironment, globals, Undefined behavior, and render call stacks.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是可控 Jinja2 表达式由目标环境求值并访问超出普通展示变量的测试对象属性或方法产生 canary，数据源与 sink 连续关联。 假阳性边界：{{config}} 在正常模板中由开发者定义、对象被 Undefined、表达式原样显示、只看到 Flask debug 信息、沙箱拒绝属性或手工模板控制台执行都不是注入。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires controlled Jinja2 to be evaluated by the target environment and access a test-object attribute or method beyond ordinary display variables to produce a canary, continuously correlating source and sink. False-positive boundary: Developer-defined {{config}} in a legitimate template, Undefined results, literal expression display, Flask debug information, sandboxed attribute denial, or manual template-console execution does not prove injection.

opsecTips.zh: Jinja2 验证不得遍历 __mro__/__subclasses__、读取 config/request.environ 或执行系统调用；出现数据泄露、进程、外连、文件访问或 worker 重启时停止。
opsecTips.en: Jinja2 validation never traverses __mro__ or __subclasses__, reads config or request.environ, or invokes system calls; stop on data disclosure, processes, egress, file access, or worker restarts.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试 route/template/object 与 canary，清理 Jinja2/Flask 缓存和测试请求，轮换临时会话并重启隔离 worker。
opsecTips.en: Delete test routes, templates, objects, and canaries, clear Jinja2 and Flask caches plus test requests, rotate temporary sessions, and restart isolated workers.

name.zh: ODT content.xml 外部实体注入

description.zh: 验证服务端 ODT 预览、转换或索引流程在解析 content.xml 时是否允许 DTD 和外部实体。
description.en: Verifies whether server-side ODT preview, conversion, or indexing permits DTDs and external entities while parsing content.xml.

overview.zh: ODT 是包含 content.xml 等部件的 OpenDocument ZIP 包。风险只在服务器解包并用 XML 解析器处理正文时成立，常见触发点包括在线预览、文档转 PDF、全文索引和内容审查；单纯存储或下载 ODT 不会触发外部实体。
overview.en: ODT is an OpenDocument ZIP package containing content.xml and related parts. The risk exists only when a server unpacks and parses the body XML, commonly for preview, PDF conversion, full-text indexing, or content review. Storage or download alone does not trigger an external entity.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是 ODT 处理组件沿用允许 DTD 或外部资源的 XML 默认配置，同时转换进程拥有不必要的文件或网络权限。异步任务、LibreOffice 服务或第三方解析库可能位于上传接口之后，因此必须将回显、外连和日志关联到具体转换任务。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is an ODT processor that retains XML defaults allowing DTDs or external resources while its conversion process has unnecessary file or network privileges. Asynchronous jobs, LibreOffice services, or third-party libraries may sit behind the upload endpoint, so output, egress, and logs must be correlated to a specific conversion job.

exploitation.zh: 1. 创建结构有效且仅修改 content.xml 的 ODT 对照文件；2. 在隔离环境触发实际预览或转换，记录队列时间、工作进程和输出；3. 比较含实体、不含 DOCTYPE 及不存在资源三组结果。观察证据是受控标记进入转换文本或解析日志；上传状态、文件图标变化及通用超时不能单独证明 XXE，这些情况应按假阳性处理。
exploitation.en: 1. Create a valid ODT control set that changes only content.xml. 2. Trigger the real preview or conversion flow in isolation and record queue timing, worker process, and output. 3. Compare entity, no-DOCTYPE, and missing-resource variants. A controlled marker in converted text or parser logs is evidence; upload status, icon changes, and generic timeouts do not prove XXE.

mitigation.zh: 1. 为 ODT/XML 解析器显式禁用 DTD、外部实体和外部模式；2. 以低权限、无出站网络、只读挂载运行转换服务；3. 限制压缩包大小、层级、部件类型和解压后总量；4. 对转换任务的实体错误、异常文件访问和网络行为建立监控，并保留安全 ODT 回归集。
mitigation.en: 1. Explicitly disable DTDs, external entities, and external schemas in ODT/XML parsers. 2. Run conversion with low privilege, no egress, and read-only mounts. 3. Limit archive size, depth, part types, and expanded size. 4. Monitor conversion jobs for entity errors, unusual file access, and network behavior, and retain a safe ODT regression set.

title.zh: 定位 ODT 转换任务

description.zh: 确认上传后的预览、索引或 PDF 任务由哪个进程解析 content.xml，并记录任务关联 ID。
description.en: Identify which process parses content.xml for preview, indexing, or PDF conversion and record the job correlation ID.

title.zh: 运行 content.xml 对照样例

description.zh: 向隔离转换链提交现有 ODT XML 集合，并同步收集转换输出、解析器错误和进程访问记录。
description.en: Submit the existing ODT XML set to the isolated conversion chain and collect output, parser errors, and process access records.

title.zh: 确认实体解析而非上传异常
title.en: Confirm entity resolution, not upload failure

description.zh: 只有受控实体内容或明确实体访问日志与该任务对应时才确认问题，普通拒绝、超时或格式错误均作为对照结果。
description.en: Confirm the issue only when controlled entity content or explicit entity-access logs correlate with the job; ordinary rejection, timeout, or format errors remain controls.

title.zh: 收紧转换沙箱后复测
title.en: Retest after tightening the conversion sandbox

description.zh: 关闭外部实体并移除文件、网络权限后重复转换，确认正常 ODT 可用且实体内容不再出现。
description.en: Disable external entities, remove file and network privileges, and repeat conversion to confirm normal ODT files work while entity content no longer appears.

review.rationale: 该条是 ODT 内嵌 XML 输入，应按文档型 XXE Payload 管理。

prerequisites.zh: 服务端 ODT 预览、转换或索引流程解包并解析 content.xml，所用 XML 库与 DTD/外部实体设置已确认。
prerequisites.en: A server-side ODT preview, conversion, or indexing flow unpacks and parses content.xml, with XML library and DTD or external-entity settings confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: 构造符合 ODF 包结构的最小文档，只引用转换 worker 可见的固定 marker 文件，并记录归档哈希、任务和转换产物。
prerequisites.en: A minimal document conforms to ODF package structure and references only a fixed marker file visible to the conversion worker, recording archive hash, job, and conversion artifacts.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是解析 content.xml 的服务进程读取 marker 并将其展开到 ODT 文档树、文本提取或预览输出，文件审计与任务相符。 假阳性边界：ODT 被接受、客户端 LibreOffice 展开、DOCTYPE 仅存在于 ZIP、转换失败、输出空白或日志出现实体名称均不能证明服务器读取。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the process parsing content.xml to read the marker and expand it into the ODT tree, extracted text, or preview output, with file audit matching the job. False-positive boundary: ODT acceptance, client-side LibreOffice expansion, a DOCTYPE merely present in the ZIP, conversion failure, blank output, or entity names in logs does not prove a server read.

opsecTips.zh: ODT XXE 只使用无敏感 marker，不引用系统文件/远程 URL；出现真实文件读取、外连、解包异常、转换队列积压或进程崩溃时停止。
opsecTips.en: ODT XXE uses a nonsensitive marker only and never references system files or remote URLs; stop on real-file reads, egress, extraction anomalies, conversion backlog, or process crashes.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 ODT、解包临时目录、索引/预览产物和 marker，清理转换队列与缓存，并重启隔离 office worker。
opsecTips.en: Delete ODT files, extraction directories, index or preview artifacts, and markers, clear conversion queues and caches, and restart isolated office workers.

name.zh: Node.js 原型链污染输入

description.zh: 覆盖不安全深合并、路径赋值和反序列化对 __proto__、constructor.prototype 等特殊键的处理。
description.en: Covers unsafe deep merge, path assignment, and deserialization of special keys such as __proto__ and constructor.prototype.

overview.zh: 该条验证 Node.js 应用是否把攻击者控制的 JSON 或键路径递归写入普通对象原型。它与 SSTI 无关，风险通常先表现为新建对象继承异常属性，随后才可能通过权限判断、配置覆盖或已有 gadget 产生业务影响。
overview.en: This entry verifies whether a Node.js application recursively writes attacker-controlled JSON or key paths into ordinary object prototypes. It is not SSTI. The first observable effect is usually an unexpected inherited property; authorization, configuration, or gadget impact is a separate step.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是深合并、克隆、路径设置或查询参数解析逻辑未拒绝 __proto__、prototype 和 constructor 等危险键，并把数据写到共享原型。仅在输入对象自身出现 admin 字段并不证明污染；必须观察到与输入对象无关的新对象继承了该属性。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is deep merge, clone, path setter, or query parsing logic that does not reject dangerous keys such as __proto__, prototype, and constructor and writes into a shared prototype. An admin field on the input object itself is not proof; an unrelated newly created object must inherit the property.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在隔离实例记录新建空对象的基线属性；2. 提交只设置无害随机标记的特殊键 JSON，再创建独立对象检查是否继承；3. 重启进程或更换请求验证污染范围和生命周期。观察证据是独立对象稳定继承标记并可追踪到合并函数；普通字段回显、请求对象自有属性或测试夹具预置值属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Record baseline properties of a newly created empty object in an isolated instance. 2. Submit special-key JSON containing only a harmless random marker, then create an independent object and test inheritance. 3. Restart the process or use a separate request to determine scope and lifetime. Evidence is stable inheritance by an unrelated object traced to the merge function; ordinary reflection, own properties, or fixture defaults are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在入口和所有递归层拒绝 __proto__、prototype、constructor 等键；2. 使用维护良好的合并库、schema 校验及 Object.create(null) 存储字典数据；3. 权限和安全配置只读取对象自有属性并设置明确默认值；4. 升级受影响依赖，监控危险键并为跨请求继承添加回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Reject __proto__, prototype, constructor, and related keys at every recursive level. 2. Use maintained merge libraries, schema validation, and Object.create(null) for dictionary data. 3. Read only own properties for authorization and security configuration with explicit defaults. 4. Update affected dependencies, monitor dangerous keys, and add cross-request inheritance regression tests.

title.zh: 建立对象原型基线

description.zh: 在新进程中创建与请求无关的对象，记录目标属性不存在，并固定应用版本与合并路径。
description.en: Create an object unrelated to the request in a fresh process, record that the target property is absent, and fix the application version and merge path.

title.zh: 提交无害特殊键标记

description.zh: 使用现有 JSON 集合但只以随机无害值观察合并行为，避免直接把权限变化当作第一证据。
description.en: Use the existing JSON set with a harmless random value to observe merge behavior without treating an authorization change as the first proof.

title.zh: 验证独立对象继承
title.en: Verify inheritance on an independent object

description.zh: 在另一个代码路径创建新对象，确认属性来自原型而不是自身字段，并通过重启判断污染是否为进程级。
description.en: Create a new object on another code path, confirm the property comes from the prototype rather than an own field, and restart to determine process scope.

title.zh: 封锁危险键并回归

description.zh: 加入递归键过滤、schema 和自有属性读取后，重复相同输入并确认独立对象不再继承标记。
description.en: Add recursive key filtering, schema validation, and own-property access, then repeat the input and confirm unrelated objects no longer inherit the marker.

review.rationale: 该条是触发对象合并缺陷的 JSON 输入，应从 SSTI 改分到原型链污染 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 外部对象进入不安全深合并、路径赋值或反序列化逻辑，且 __proto__ 或 constructor.prototype 键未被 schema/own-property 检查拒绝。
prerequisites.en: An external object reaches unsafe deep merge, path assignment, or deserialization where __proto__ or constructor.prototype keys are not rejected by schema or own-property checks.

prerequisites.zh: 一次性 Node worker 使用唯一不可执行 marker 属性和合并前后原型描述符快照，同时准备普通嵌套键与拒绝特殊键对照。
prerequisites.en: A disposable Node worker uses a unique nonexecutable marker property and prototype-descriptor snapshots before and after merging, with ordinary nested-key and rejected-special-key controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是可控特殊键使新建无关对象从 Object.prototype 或目标构造器原型继承 marker，并能从具体 merge/assign 调用栈追溯。 假阳性边界：输入对象自身含 admin 属性、JSON.parse 保留 __proto__ 但未合并、只有原对象变化、库显式创建 null prototype、shell 字符串存在或进程未受影响均不是污染。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires controlled special keys to make a newly created unrelated object inherit the marker from Object.prototype or a target constructor prototype, traced to the specific merge or assignment call. False-positive boundary: An own admin property, JSON.parse preserving __proto__ without a merge, mutation of only the input object, explicit null prototypes, a shell string, or no effect on new objects does not prove pollution.

opsecTips.zh: 原型污染测试只写唯一 marker，不设置 admin/role/shell 业务键；发现全局授权变化、命令 sink、跨请求持续、依赖异常或 worker 不稳定时停止。
opsecTips.en: Prototype-pollution testing writes a unique marker only and never business admin, role, or shell keys; stop on global authorization changes, command sinks, cross-request persistence, dependency anomalies, or worker instability.

opsecTips.zh: 立即销毁污染 worker，删除测试对象/marker，清理模块和应用缓存，重启所有隔离进程并验证新对象原型无该属性。
opsecTips.en: Destroy the polluted worker immediately, delete test objects and markers, clear module and application caches, restart all isolated processes, and verify new-object prototypes lack the property.

name.zh: Smarty 模板表达式注入

description.zh: 针对 PHP Smarty 模板源码可控的场景，核对安全策略、版本差异以及 PHP 标签和函数调用能力。
description.en: Targets controllable PHP Smarty template source and evaluates security policy, version differences, PHP tags, and callable function exposure.

overview.zh: Smarty SSTI 需要攻击者输入进入模板源码或可编辑模板，而非普通变量值。历史版本中的 `{php}` 标签、可调用 PHP 函数和资源加载行为差异很大，必须结合 Smarty 版本、SecurityPolicy、插件及 PHP 配置判断实际能力。
overview.en: Smarty SSTI requires attacker input to become template source or an editable template rather than an ordinary variable value. Historical `{php}` tags, callable PHP functions, and resource loading differ significantly by Smarty version, SecurityPolicy, plugins, and PHP configuration.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是应用允许不可信内容控制 Smarty 语法，同时未启用或错误配置安全策略，使模板能够调用危险函数、读取资源或访问过宽对象。某个旧语法被解析报错并不等于可执行；禁用标签、未知函数和模板缓存也会改变结果。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is allowing untrusted content to control Smarty syntax without a correctly configured security policy, exposing dangerous functions, resources, or objects. A parse error for historical syntax is not execution; disabled tags, unknown functions, and template caching alter the outcome.

exploitation.zh: 1. 获取 Smarty 版本和 SecurityPolicy 配置并建立普通插值基线；2. 使用无副作用表达式确认模板编译，再逐项观察 PHP 标签、函数调用和资源访问是允许还是拒绝；3. 在隔离环境运行现有样例并启用/禁用策略对照。观察证据是稳定的服务端模板结果或明确策略拒绝；缓存旧页面、PHP 错误页及字符串原样输出属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Record the Smarty version and SecurityPolicy and establish a normal interpolation baseline. 2. Confirm template compilation with a side-effect-free expression, then observe whether PHP tags, function calls, and resource access are allowed or denied. 3. Run the existing sample in isolation with policy enabled and disabled. Stable server-side template results or explicit policy denial are evidence; stale cache, PHP error pages, and literal output are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 固定模板文件并只通过变量传值，禁止用户编辑原始 Smarty 源码；2. 启用最严格 SecurityPolicy，限制函数、修饰器、资源和对象访问；3. 升级 Smarty 并删除遗留 `{php}` 支持及危险插件；4. 分离模板缓存、记录编译错误，并为被禁止语法建立负向回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Use fixed templates and pass values only through variables; do not let users edit raw Smarty source. 2. Enable the strictest SecurityPolicy and restrict functions, modifiers, resources, and object access. 3. Upgrade Smarty and remove legacy `{php}` support and dangerous plugins. 4. Isolate template caches, log compilation errors, and add negative tests for forbidden syntax.

title.zh: 核对 Smarty 版本与策略

description.zh: 确认实际 Smarty 主版本、SecurityPolicy、允许函数和插件清单，避免把不适用的旧语法当成有效能力。
description.en: Identify the deployed Smarty major version, SecurityPolicy, allowed functions, and plugins so obsolete syntax is not treated as valid capability.

title.zh: 验证模板源码是否可控

description.zh: 在隔离模板提交现有 Smarty 表达式集合，区分普通变量插值、语法拒绝和函数实际执行。
description.en: Submit the existing Smarty expression set to an isolated template and distinguish variable interpolation, syntax denial, and actual function execution.

title.zh: 排除缓存和错误页干扰

description.zh: 清理模板缓存并以唯一标记重复请求，确认结果来自本次编译而非旧缓存或通用 PHP 错误页。
description.en: Clear template caches and repeat with a unique marker to confirm the result comes from the current compilation rather than stale cache or a generic PHP error page.

title.zh: 启用安全策略并复测

description.zh: 将输入改为变量绑定、限制函数和资源后重新提交相同集合，确认业务输出正常而危险能力被拒绝。
description.en: Switch to variable binding, restrict functions and resources, and resubmit the same set to confirm business output works while dangerous capabilities are denied.

review.rationale: 该条是 Smarty 模板语法集合，按 PHP 模板注入 Payload 保留。

prerequisites.zh: 用户输入进入 Smarty 模板源码，实际 Smarty/PHP 版本、{php} 支持、安全策略、允许函数和编译目录可核验。
prerequisites.en: User input enters Smarty template source, with actual Smarty and PHP versions, {php} support, security policy, allowed functions, and compile directory verifiable.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离 Smarty 环境注册只返回固定 canary 的测试 modifier/function，跟踪模板编译与插件调用；原系统命令和 {php} 行不执行。
prerequisites.en: An isolated Smarty environment registers a test modifier or function returning only a fixed canary and traces compilation and plugin calls; source system commands and {php} lines are not executed.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标 Smarty 将可控语法作为模板编译，并调用超出普通变量插值的测试 modifier/function 产生 canary，编译文件与请求关联。 假阳性边界：花括号字符串回显、{php} 在新版被移除/禁用、system 未在允许列表、模板语法错误、普通 modifier 输出或本地旧版 PoC 成功均不是目标 RCE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target Smarty engine to compile controlled syntax as a template and call a test modifier or function beyond ordinary interpolation to produce a canary, correlating compiled file and request. False-positive boundary: Literal braces, {php} removed or disabled in newer versions, system absent from allowlists, template errors, normal modifier output, or success in a local legacy proof does not prove target RCE.

opsecTips.zh: Smarty 验证禁止执行原反引号/system 行或写入编译目录；出现进程、文件/网络动作、PHP 配置泄露、模板持久修改或 worker 异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: Smarty validation never executes source backtick or system lines or writes compile directories; stop on processes, file or network actions, PHP configuration disclosure, persistent template changes, or worker anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试模板/plugin/canary，清空 Smarty compile/cache 目录中的测试产物，恢复安全策略并重启隔离 PHP worker。
opsecTips.en: Delete test templates, plugins, and canaries, clear test artifacts from Smarty compile and cache directories, restore the security policy, and restart isolated PHP workers.

name.zh: 多引擎 SSTI 指纹与验证集合
name.en: Multi-Engine SSTI Fingerprinting and Validation Set

description.zh: 汇总多种模板语法，用于在未知技术栈中建立引擎指纹并验证服务端表达式求值边界。
description.en: Collects multiple template syntaxes to fingerprint an unknown stack and validate the boundary of server-side expression evaluation.

overview.zh: 该集合适合技术栈未知、同一参数可能经过多层渲染的场景。它比通用四种表达式覆盖更多引擎特征，但目标仍是先确定哪一种语法被服务端解释，再转到对应引擎条目；不应把整套样例无差别发送后仅凭一个异常下结论。
overview.en: This set is intended for unknown stacks or inputs that may pass through multiple rendering layers. It covers more engine signatures than the basic probes, but the goal is still to identify which syntax is interpreted on the server and then move to the engine-specific entry, not to infer a vulnerability from one error after sending everything.

vulnerability.zh: 根因可能位于视图名拼接、邮件与报表模板、CMS 可编辑模板或二次渲染链。多层框架会对分隔符进行转义、预处理或再次解释，因此同一字符序列可能由前端、网关或后端不同层处理，必须通过成对对照定位实际求值层。
vulnerability.en: The root cause may be dynamic view names, mail and report templates, CMS-editable templates, or a second rendering pass. Multi-layer frameworks can escape, preprocess, or reinterpret delimiters, so the same sequence may be handled by the client, gateway, or backend. Paired controls are required to locate the evaluation layer.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录每个候选引擎的无副作用算术表达式及预期值；2. 分批提交而非一次混发，保留状态码、错误签名、编码变化和响应片段；3. 对命中的语法使用错误表达式与随机常量复测，并检查服务端日志。观察证据是同一语法族稳定求值且错误与引擎匹配；单次 500、WAF 拦截和客户端模板替换属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Record a side-effect-free arithmetic expression and expected value for each candidate engine. 2. Submit in small groups rather than all at once, preserving status, error signatures, encoding changes, and response fragments. 3. Retest a matching syntax with malformed expressions and random constants and inspect server logs. Stable evaluation within one syntax family plus matching engine errors is evidence; a single 500, WAF block, or client template replacement is a false positive.

mitigation.zh: 1. 建立统一模板服务边界，禁止任意模板源码或动态视图名；2. 对各引擎启用变量绑定、自动转义、沙箱和最小上下文；3. 去除不必要的二次渲染与模板上传能力；4. 按引擎记录编译异常和探测模式，并维护跨引擎负向回归矩阵。
mitigation.en: 1. Establish a clear template-service boundary and prohibit arbitrary template source and dynamic view names. 2. Enable variable binding, auto-escaping, sandboxing, and minimal context for every engine. 3. Remove unnecessary second-pass rendering and template upload. 4. Log compilation errors and probe patterns per engine and maintain a cross-engine negative regression matrix.

title.zh: 建立候选引擎矩阵

description.zh: 根据响应头、错误页、依赖清单和业务框架列出可能引擎，并为每个引擎定义唯一无副作用预期值。
description.en: Use headers, error pages, dependency inventory, and the application framework to list candidate engines and define a unique side-effect-free expected value for each.

title.zh: 分组提交指纹集合

description.zh: 分批运行现有多引擎表达式集合，记录每组响应差异，避免大量语法混合后无法归因。
description.en: Run the existing multi-engine expression set in batches and record response differences so any result can be attributed to a syntax family.

title.zh: 用错误语法确认解析层
title.en: Confirm the parser with malformed syntax

description.zh: 对候选语法加入错误表达式和随机常量，结合服务端模板日志确认实际引擎及求值层。
description.en: Add malformed expressions and random constants for candidate syntax and use server template logs to confirm the actual engine and evaluation layer.

title.zh: 转入引擎专属修复

description.zh: 确定引擎后停止广谱探测，按对应引擎收紧模板来源、上下文和沙箱，并执行专属回归用例。
description.en: After identifying the engine, stop broad probing, restrict template sources, context, and sandbox settings for that engine, and run engine-specific regression cases.

review.rationale: 这是多模板引擎的输入指纹集合，仍属于 Payload，但应与基础通用探测区分。

prerequisites.zh: 未知技术栈的可控值确实进入服务端模板编译路径，能够逐个隔离 Jinja2、Mako、FreeMarker、SpEL 等候选语法而非混合投递。
prerequisites.en: A controllable value in an unknown stack reaches server-side template compilation, and candidate syntaxes such as Jinja2, Mako, FreeMarker, or SpEL can be isolated rather than submitted together.

prerequisites.zh: 每个候选引擎只使用其独有的无害算术/字符串 canary，并保存响应、错误签名、模板调用栈与版本证据。
prerequisites.en: Each candidate engine uses its own harmless arithmetic or string canary, preserving responses, error signatures, template call stacks, and version evidence.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是某一候选语法在服务端由对应模板引擎稳定求值，并通过引擎特有 canary/错误和调用栈交叉确认；随后能力必须另行验证。 假阳性边界：整套字典中任一字符串变化、通用 49、客户端模板执行、错误页关键词、超时、WAF 规则命中或高危文件读取示例本身都不是引擎确认。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires one candidate syntax to be consistently evaluated server-side by its matching engine and cross-confirmed by engine-specific canary or error plus call stack; further capability is assessed separately. False-positive boundary: Any response change from the corpus, generic 49, client-side template execution, error-page keywords, timeout, WAF match, or the presence of high-impact file-read examples does not confirm an engine.

opsecTips.zh: 多引擎指纹每轮只投递一个短 canary；禁止对象图、文件读取和命令样例，发现模板缓存污染、错误风暴、CPU 增长或非预期输出时停止。
opsecTips.en: Multi-engine fingerprinting submits one short canary per run and forbids object-graph, file-read, and command examples; stop on template-cache contamination, error storms, CPU growth, or unexpected output.

opsecTips.zh: 删除候选输入和编译模板，清理各引擎缓存/错误日志/canary，重启测试 renderer，并记录排除与确认的引擎版本。
opsecTips.en: Delete candidate inputs and compiled templates, clear each engine's caches, error logs, and canaries, restart test renderers, and record excluded and confirmed engine versions.

name.zh: SVG 主动内容跨站脚本

description.zh: 验证 SVG 在内联、object、iframe 或错误内容类型下被浏览器作为主动文档执行脚本或事件处理器的场景。
description.en: Validates cases where SVG is treated as an active document through inline markup, object, iframe, or an unsafe content type and executes scripts or event handlers.

overview.zh: SVG 是基于 XML 的图形格式，在内联 DOM、独立导航、object 或 iframe 加载时可能具备脚本、事件和外部资源能力。风险取决于实际嵌入方式、响应 Content-Type、Content-Disposition、CSP 和清洗器行为，作为普通 img 图片加载时通常受更严格限制。
overview.en: SVG is an XML-based image format that may support scripts, events, and external resources when used inline, navigated directly, or loaded through object or iframe. Risk depends on embedding mode, response Content-Type, Content-Disposition, CSP, and sanitization; ordinary img loading is usually more restricted.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是应用接受可控 SVG 并在同源主动文档上下文返回，或清洗器只过滤 script 标签而遗漏事件属性、链接和命名空间变体。仅上传成功或 SVG 可显示不代表 XSS，必须证明代码在目标源、目标嵌入方式和真实响应头下执行。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is accepting controllable SVG and returning it as an active same-origin document, or sanitizing only script tags while missing event attributes, links, and namespace variants. Upload success or visible SVG does not prove XSS; execution must occur under the target origin, embedding mode, and actual response headers.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录 SVG 的上传后 URL、响应头和所有实际嵌入位置；2. 在隔离测试账号中提交带唯一无害 DOM 标记的现有 SVG 样例，分别通过 img、object、iframe 和直接导航观察；3. 使用已清洗 SVG 和纯图片作为对照。观察证据是目标源页面出现唯一脚本标记或受控事件；解析错误、下载提示和图片显示属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Record the uploaded SVG URL, response headers, and every real embedding location. 2. With an isolated test account, submit the existing SVG sample using a unique harmless DOM marker and observe img, object, iframe, and direct navigation separately. 3. Compare with sanitized SVG and a plain image. Evidence is the unique script marker or controlled event under the target origin; parse errors, download prompts, and image display are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 不需要主动 SVG 时将其转码为安全位图；2. 必须保留 SVG 时使用成熟白名单清洗器并移除脚本、事件、外链和危险命名空间；3. 以附件或隔离无 Cookie 域提供文件，设置正确 Content-Type、nosniff 和 CSP；4. 覆盖每种嵌入方式做回归并监控异常 SVG 标记。
mitigation.en: 1. Convert SVG to a safe bitmap when active SVG is unnecessary. 2. If SVG must remain, use a mature allowlist sanitizer and remove scripts, events, external links, and dangerous namespaces. 3. Serve files as attachments or from an isolated cookieless origin with correct Content-Type, nosniff, and CSP. 4. Test every embedding mode and monitor suspicious SVG constructs.

title.zh: 记录 SVG 交付上下文

description.zh: 收集上传 URL、Content-Type、Content-Disposition、CSP、同源属性和页面真实嵌入标签。
description.en: Collect the upload URL, Content-Type, Content-Disposition, CSP, origin relationship, and the actual embedding element.

title.zh: 在各嵌入模式运行样例
title.en: Run the sample across embedding modes

description.zh: 在隔离账号中使用现有 SVG XSS 集合，逐一比较 img、object、iframe 和直接导航的行为。
description.en: Use the existing SVG XSS set with an isolated account and compare img, object, iframe, and direct navigation one by one.

title.zh: 以唯一 DOM 标记确认执行
title.en: Confirm execution with a unique DOM marker

description.zh: 只把目标源中可重复出现的唯一无害标记视为脚本证据，排除下载、渲染成功和浏览器扩展干扰。
description.en: Treat only a repeatable harmless marker under the target origin as script evidence, excluding download behavior, successful rendering, and browser-extension effects.

title.zh: 转码或隔离后回归

description.zh: 启用 SVG 清洗、位图转码或独立静态域后重复所有嵌入路径，确认图片功能保留且主动内容不执行。
description.en: After SVG sanitization, bitmap transcoding, or static-origin isolation, repeat every embedding path to confirm images still work and active content no longer executes.

review.rationale: 该条是浏览器解析的 SVG 主动内容输入，应从 SSTI 改分到 XSS Payload。

prerequisites.zh: SVG 被内联或通过 object/iframe/可执行文档 MIME 加载，目标浏览器不会仅把它交给 img 解码器或附件下载。
prerequisites.en: SVG is loaded inline or through object, iframe, or an active-document MIME rather than passed only to an img decoder or attachment download.

prerequisites.zh: 使用固定本地 marker 替换 alert/cookie/location 行，记录响应 Content-Type、Content-Disposition、CSP、嵌入方式、DOM 与事件栈。
prerequisites.en: A fixed local marker replaces alert, cookie, and location lines, while response Content-Type, Content-Disposition, CSP, embed mode, DOM, and event stack are recorded.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 SVG 在目标加载方式下作为活动文档创建 onload/script 处理器并执行 marker，执行 origin 与宿主页关系明确。 假阳性边界：SVG 上传/显示成功、源码含 onload、img 中渲染、附件下载、CSP 阻断、sanitizer 删除事件或 alert 来自测试页面均不是 SVG XSS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires SVG to become an active document in the target load mode, create an onload or script handler, and execute the marker, with execution origin and host-page relationship identified. False-positive boundary: Successful SVG upload or display, onload text in source, img rendering, attachment download, CSP blocking, sanitizer removal, or an alert from the test harness does not prove SVG XSS.

opsecTips.zh: SVG XSS 只执行本地 marker，禁止读取 cookie/domain/location 或外连；出现顶层导航、父页访问、重复事件、object URL 泄漏或非测试会话时停止。
opsecTips.en: SVG XSS executes a local marker only and never reads cookie, domain, or location or performs egress; stop on top-level navigation, parent-page access, repeated events, object-URL leakage, or a non-test session.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 SVG 和嵌入节点，撤销 blob/object URL，清理浏览器/CDN/图片缓存和 CSP 报告，并重载宿主页确认无执行。
opsecTips.en: Delete SVGs and embed nodes, revoke blob and object URLs, clear browser, CDN, and image caches plus CSP reports, and reload the host page to confirm no execution.

name.zh: SVG XML 外部实体综合变体
name.en: Comprehensive SVG XML External Entity Variants

description.zh: 覆盖服务端 SVG 解析器在读取本地实体、远程实体和不同文档结构时的 XXE 行为差异。
description.en: Covers XXE behavior differences in server-side SVG parsers across local entities, remote entities, and varied document structures.

overview.zh: 该集合面向会在服务器端解析 SVG XML 的图片检查、缩略图、转码和内容提取组件，包含多种实体与文档结构。浏览器直接显示 SVG 与服务端 XXE 是两个不同边界；只有后端解析器实际展开实体或发起外部请求时才属于本条风险。
overview.en: This set targets image validation, thumbnail, transcoding, and extraction components that parse SVG XML on the server, covering multiple entities and document structures. Browser rendering and server-side XXE are separate boundaries; the issue exists only when a backend parser expands an entity or makes an external request.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是图片流水线把 SVG 当作可信 XML，并在具有文件或网络权限的进程中保留 DTD、外部实体或 XInclude 能力。不同库可能先栅格化、先清洗或直接透传，因此必须确定触发解析的具体阶段，不能由 SVG 上传成功推断 XXE。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is treating SVG as trusted XML while retaining DTD, external entity, or XInclude capability in a process with file or network access. Libraries may rasterize, sanitize, or pass through the file, so the exact parsing stage must be identified; upload success does not imply XXE.

exploitation.zh: 1. 绘制上传、查毒、尺寸读取、缩略图和 CDN 发布的处理顺序；2. 在隔离环境提交现有 SVG XXE 变体并为每个任务记录唯一标识；3. 比较无 DOCTYPE、无效实体和合法 SVG。观察证据是转换输出或解析日志包含受控实体标记，或任务发起与标识对应的外连；图片损坏、通用 500 或客户端渲染差异属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Map the order of upload, scanning, dimension reading, thumbnailing, and CDN publication. 2. Submit the existing SVG XXE variants in isolation with a unique job marker. 3. Compare no-DOCTYPE, invalid-entity, and valid SVG controls. Evidence is a controlled entity marker in transformed output or parser logs, or correlated egress from the job; broken images, generic 500 responses, and client rendering differences are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 对 SVG 禁用 DTD、外部实体、XInclude 和外部样式资源；2. 首选经过安全解析器的位图转码，并丢弃原始主动内容；3. 将图片处理器放入低权限、无网络、只读文件系统沙箱；4. 统一各处理阶段的策略，监控实体错误和出站连接并建立 SVG 变体回归集。
mitigation.en: 1. Disable DTDs, external entities, XInclude, and external style resources for SVG. 2. Prefer safe bitmap transcoding and discard original active content. 3. Run image processors in a low-privilege sandbox with no network and a read-only file system. 4. Align policy across processing stages, monitor entity errors and egress, and keep an SVG variant regression set.

title.zh: 绘制 SVG 服务端流水线

description.zh: 识别校验、元数据读取、缩略图和转码各阶段使用的库、进程权限和网络权限。
description.en: Identify the libraries, process privileges, and network access used for validation, metadata reading, thumbnailing, and transcoding.

title.zh: 分批提交 SVG 实体变体
title.en: Submit SVG entity variants in batches

description.zh: 在隔离流水线按文档结构分批运行现有 SVG XXE 集合，并为转换任务添加唯一关联标记。
description.en: Run the existing SVG XXE set in batches by document structure in an isolated pipeline and attach a unique correlation marker to each conversion job.

title.zh: 关联实体展开证据

description.zh: 将输出文本、解析器错误、文件访问和出站网络与具体任务对应，排除浏览器渲染和普通图片损坏。
description.en: Correlate output text, parser errors, file access, and egress with the specific job, excluding browser rendering and ordinary image corruption.

title.zh: 统一关闭 XML 外部能力

description.zh: 在所有 SVG 处理阶段关闭外部能力并复测每类结构，确认策略没有只覆盖其中一个解析器。
description.en: Disable external XML capabilities at every SVG processing stage and retest each structure to confirm the policy is not limited to one parser.

review.rationale: 该条是服务端 SVG 解析器输入集合，应归入 XXE Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 服务端 SVG parser/渲染器会解析 image xlink:href 或 XML 实体，能够区分 URI 资源加载、DTD 实体展开和浏览器端行为。
prerequisites.en: A server-side SVG parser or renderer processes image xlink:href or XML entities, and URI resource loading, DTD entity expansion, and browser-side behavior can be distinguished.

prerequisites.zh: 把所有 file 路径替换为渲染 worker 可见的无敏感 marker 图像/文本，并使用自有空 HTTP 端点观测远程加载，记录 parser 调用。
prerequisites.en: All file paths are replaced with nonsensitive marker images or text visible to the render worker, and an owned empty HTTP endpoint observes remote loads while parser calls are recorded.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据按变体区分：xlink 需 worker 实际读取/嵌入 marker 资源，DTD 需实体值进入解析结果；文件审计或自有请求必须关联任务。 假阳性边界：浏览器加载 SVG 外链、URI 字符串出现在 XML、渲染器画出破图标、文件不存在错误、只发生 DNS 或 parser 禁止 DTD 均不能统称 XXE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is variant-specific: xlink requires the worker to read or embed the marker resource, while DTD requires the entity value to enter the parse result; file audit or owned requests must correlate with the job. False-positive boundary: Browser-side external loading, a URI string in XML, a broken-image render, file-not-found errors, DNS alone, or DTD-disabled parsing cannot all be labeled XXE.

opsecTips.zh: SVG XML 综合测试每轮只验证一种加载机制，禁止系统文件和公共 URL；出现真实文件、跨网段请求、递归资源、内存增长或 worker 崩溃时停止。
opsecTips.en: Comprehensive SVG XML testing validates one load mechanism per run and forbids system files and public URLs; stop on real files, cross-segment requests, recursive resources, memory growth, or worker crashes.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 SVG、marker 资源和渲染产物，关闭自有端点，清理图像/转换缓存与任务日志，并重启隔离 renderer。
opsecTips.en: Delete SVGs, marker resources, and render artifacts, close owned endpoints, clear image and conversion caches plus job logs, and restart isolated renderers.

name.zh: SVG 上传处理链 XXE

description.zh: 聚焦上传后的 SVG 尺寸读取、预览和栅格化任务，验证外部实体是否在异步图片处理链中展开。
description.en: Focuses on post-upload SVG dimension reading, preview, and rasterization jobs to determine whether external entities expand in asynchronous image processing.

overview.zh: 该条专门覆盖“上传接口本身正常，但后续图片任务解析 SVG”这一链路。常见触发点是读取宽高、生成头像缩略图、压缩、OCR 或格式转换；异步执行意味着响应时间和真正解析时间可能分离，需要使用任务 ID 和日志关联。
overview.en: This entry specifically covers cases where the upload endpoint succeeds but a later image job parses the SVG. Common triggers include dimension reading, avatar thumbnailing, compression, OCR, or format conversion. Asynchronous execution separates response time from parsing time, so job IDs and logs are required.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是后续图片处理器使用通用 XML 解析配置并继承文件、网络权限，而上传层只验证扩展名或 MIME。前端能查看原始 SVG 不代表后端展开实体；反之，异步任务失败也可能只是格式不兼容，必须取得解析器级证据。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is a downstream image processor using general XML defaults with file or network privileges while the upload layer validates only extension or MIME. Viewing the raw SVG in a browser does not prove backend entity expansion, and an asynchronous job failure may be simple incompatibility, so parser-level evidence is required.

exploitation.zh: 1. 上传合法 SVG 并记录正常缩略图、任务状态和处理时长；2. 提交现有实体 SVG，主动触发头像裁剪、预览或转码并收集任务日志；3. 用无 DOCTYPE 和不存在资源的 SVG 对照。观察证据是受控标记进入缩略图文本/元数据或出现相关实体访问；仅任务失败、占位图或延迟属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Upload a valid SVG and record normal thumbnail output, job status, and processing time. 2. Submit the existing entity SVG, trigger avatar crop, preview, or conversion, and collect job logs. 3. Compare with no-DOCTYPE and missing-resource SVG controls. Evidence is a controlled marker in thumbnail text or metadata or correlated entity access; job failure, placeholder images, and delay alone are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 上传后立即对 SVG 进行安全解析或转为位图，后续只消费净化产物；2. 为所有图片库禁用外部实体和远程资源；3. 让任务容器无出站网络、无宿主敏感文件访问且设置时间/内存限制；4. 对异步任务记录来源文件哈希、解析异常和网络事件并持续回归。
mitigation.en: 1. Safely parse or rasterize SVG immediately after upload so downstream systems consume only sanitized output. 2. Disable external entities and remote resources in every image library. 3. Give job containers no egress or host-sensitive file access and enforce time and memory limits. 4. Record source hashes, parser exceptions, and network events for asynchronous jobs and maintain regression coverage.

title.zh: 确认异步 SVG 触发点

description.zh: 记录上传后哪些用户动作会启动尺寸读取、缩略图或转码任务，并获取可关联的任务 ID。
description.en: Record which post-upload actions start dimension reading, thumbnailing, or conversion and obtain a correlatable job ID.

title.zh: 在真实处理动作中提交样例
title.en: Submit the sample through the real processing action

description.zh: 使用现有 SVG XXE 输入触发同一头像、预览或转码动作，而不是只直接访问原文件。

title.zh: 比对任务输出与解析事件
title.en: Compare job output with parser events

description.zh: 把任务状态、缩略图、实体错误、文件访问和外连按任务 ID 对齐，排除格式不兼容造成的失败。
description.en: Align job status, thumbnail output, entity errors, file access, and egress by job ID to exclude failures caused by format incompatibility.

title.zh: 只保留净化产物

description.zh: 转码并隔离原始 SVG 后重复流程，确认后续服务只读取净化位图且不再解析实体。
description.en: Rasterize and isolate the original SVG, then repeat the flow to confirm downstream services consume only sanitized bitmaps and no longer parse entities.

review.rationale: 原 SVG 集合混合普通资源实体、Gopher、PHP filter/expect、外部参数实体和 XInclude；虽然文档格式一致，但解析机制与运行时能力不同。

prerequisites.zh: 上传后的 SVG 会由服务端尺寸读取、预览或栅格化 worker 解析 XML，而不是仅静态存储或客户端浏览。
prerequisites.en: Uploaded SVG is parsed as XML by a server-side dimension, preview, or rasterization worker rather than stored statically or viewed only client-side.

prerequisites.zh: 测试 SVG 的实体只引用 worker 沙箱内固定 marker，异步任务保存上传 ID、worker PID、文件审计和生成图像/OCR 文本。
prerequisites.en: The test SVG entity references only a fixed marker inside the worker sandbox, with upload identifier, worker PID, file audit, and generated image or OCR text preserved for the asynchronous job.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是处理该上传的 worker 读取 marker，并把展开值写入 SVG text 节点的文档模型或栅格化/文本提取产物。 假阳性边界：上传成功、浏览器打开后显示实体、原 SVG 源码含 DOCTYPE、预览失败、text 节点为空或仅客户端渲染 marker 都不是服务端 XXE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the worker processing the upload to read the marker and place the expanded value into the SVG text-node model or rasterized or extracted-text artifact. False-positive boundary: Successful upload, entity display only after browser opening, a DOCTYPE in source, preview failure, an empty text node, or client-only marker rendering does not prove server-side XXE.

opsecTips.zh: SVG 上传 XXE 只读 worker 沙箱 marker；出现主机真实文件访问、外连、处理队列积压、图像炸弹行为或 worker 重启时停止。
opsecTips.en: SVG upload XXE reads only a worker-sandbox marker; stop on real host-file access, egress, processing backlog, image-bomb behavior, or worker restarts.

opsecTips.zh: 删除上传 SVG、marker、临时解包/栅格文件和预览，清理对象存储/任务队列/图像缓存并重启 worker。
opsecTips.en: Delete uploaded SVGs, markers, temporary extraction or raster files, and previews, clear object storage, job queues, and image caches, and restart workers.

name.zh: Thymeleaf / SpringEL 模板注入

description.zh: 验证 Java Thymeleaf 中动态视图名、预处理表达式和 SpringEL 上下文是否被不可信输入控制。
description.en: Validates whether untrusted input controls dynamic view names, preprocessing expressions, or the SpringEL context in Java Thymeleaf.

overview.zh: Thymeleaf 风险常出现在控制器返回可控视图名、错误页拼接、片段表达式或 `__${...}__` 预处理，而不是普通 `th:text` 变量显示。Spring 版本、Thymeleaf 模式、表达式对象和视图解析器配置决定表达式能访问的能力。
overview.en: Thymeleaf risk often appears in controllable view names, error-page concatenation, fragment expressions, or `__${...}__` preprocessing rather than ordinary `th:text` variable output. Spring and Thymeleaf versions, template mode, expression objects, and view resolver settings determine available capabilities.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是路由或业务值跨越数据边界进入模板名称或表达式源码，随后由 Standard Expression、SpringEL 或预处理机制执行。一个 `${...}` 被 HTML 转义或原样显示并不证明漏洞；必须确认表达式在服务端 Thymeleaf 阶段求值并影响视图选择或输出。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is routing or business data crossing from data into template names or expression source and then being evaluated by Standard Expressions, SpringEL, or preprocessing. An HTML-escaped or literal `${...}` does not prove a flaw; server-side Thymeleaf evaluation that changes view selection or output must be shown.

exploitation.zh: 1. 从控制器映射和错误处理定位可控视图名或片段参数；2. 先提交常量表达式和错误语法，记录 Thymeleaf/SpringEL 特征响应；3. 在隔离环境运行现有样例，分别比较普通变量、预处理与动态视图路径。观察证据是稳定的服务端求值或视图解析变化；客户端模板、404 路由差异和通用 SpEL 错误属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Use controller mappings and error handlers to locate controllable view names or fragment parameters. 2. Submit a constant expression and malformed syntax and record Thymeleaf or SpringEL signatures. 3. Run the existing sample in isolation and compare ordinary variables, preprocessing, and dynamic view paths. Stable server-side evaluation or view-resolution changes are evidence; client templates, 404 routing differences, and generic SpEL errors are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 控制器只返回固定视图枚举，不拼接请求参数或错误内容；2. 通过模型变量传递数据并避免不必要的预处理表达式；3. 限制 SpringEL 类型、表达式对象和自定义方言暴露，升级 Spring/Thymeleaf；4. 对动态视图、片段选择和模板异常建立日志及回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Controllers should return fixed allowlisted views without concatenating request parameters or error content. 2. Pass data through model variables and avoid unnecessary preprocessing expressions. 3. Restrict SpringEL types, expression objects, and custom dialect exposure and update Spring and Thymeleaf. 4. Log and test dynamic views, fragment selection, and template exceptions.

title.zh: 定位动态视图或预处理入口
title.en: Locate dynamic views or preprocessing entries

description.zh: 检查控制器返回值、redirect/forward、错误页和片段参数，确认输入进入视图名或表达式源码。
description.en: Inspect controller return values, redirect or forward handling, error pages, and fragment parameters to confirm input reaches a view name or expression source.

title.zh: 区分变量绑定与表达式求值

description.zh: 在隔离应用提交现有 Thymeleaf 集合，比较普通模型变量、预处理表达式和动态视图名的结果。
description.en: Submit the existing Thymeleaf set to an isolated application and compare model variables, preprocessing expressions, and dynamic view names.

title.zh: 关联 Thymeleaf 与 SpringEL 日志

description.zh: 通过模板解析异常、视图解析记录和唯一常量结果确认服务端阶段，排除 404、客户端模板和通用路由错误。
description.en: Use template exceptions, view resolver logs, and unique constant output to confirm the server stage, excluding 404 responses, client templates, and generic routing errors.

title.zh: 固定视图映射并回归

description.zh: 将返回值改为固定视图白名单、数据改用模型绑定后复测，确认动态表达式失效且正常页面可渲染。
description.en: Change return values to fixed allowlisted views and bind data through the model, then retest to confirm dynamic expressions fail while normal pages render.

review.rationale: 该条是 Thymeleaf/SpringEL 表达式输入，应保留为 Java 模板注入 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 不可信输入控制 Thymeleaf 动态视图名、预处理表达式或模板源码，并进入启用 SpringEL 的实际解析链。
prerequisites.en: Untrusted input controls a Thymeleaf dynamic view name, preprocessing expression, or template source and enters the real parsing chain with SpringEL enabled.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离 Spring/Thymeleaf 环境提供只返回固定 canary 的测试 bean，跟踪 __${...}__ 预处理、视图解析、SpEL 类型/方法访问；不执行 Runtime。
prerequisites.en: An isolated Spring and Thymeleaf environment provides a test bean returning only a fixed canary and traces __${...}__ preprocessing, view resolution, and SpEL type or method access without executing Runtime.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是可控值在目标 Thymeleaf 预处理/模板阶段被 SpringEL 求值，并调用超出普通模型范围的测试 bean 产生 canary，解析栈可定位。 假阳性边界：视图名含下划线语法、普通 ${model} 插值、SpringEL 被 SimpleEvaluationContext 限制、模板错误、Runtime 文本回显或本地旧版 PoC 有效均不是目标 RCE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the controlled value to be evaluated by SpringEL during target Thymeleaf preprocessing or rendering and call a test bean beyond the ordinary model to produce a canary, with a traceable parser stack. False-positive boundary: Underscore syntax in a view name, normal ${model} interpolation, SpringEL constrained by SimpleEvaluationContext, template errors, reflected Runtime text, or a local legacy proof does not prove target RCE.

opsecTips.zh: Thymeleaf 验证禁止原 Runtime/Scanner 命令和真实 bean 访问；出现进程、文件/网络副作用、视图缓存污染、ApplicationContext 修改或线程异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: Thymeleaf validation never executes source Runtime or Scanner commands or accesses real beans; stop on processes, file or network effects, view-cache contamination, ApplicationContext mutation, or thread anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试视图/bean/canary，清理 Thymeleaf 和 SpringEL 缓存，恢复 view resolver/安全上下文并重启测试实例。
opsecTips.en: Delete test views, beans, and canaries, clear Thymeleaf and SpringEL caches, restore the view resolver and safe context, and restart the test instance.

name.zh: Twig 模板表达式注入

description.zh: 覆盖 PHP Twig 模板源码可控、过滤器/函数暴露和 SandboxExtension 策略边界。
description.en: Covers controllable PHP Twig template source, exposed filters or functions, and SandboxExtension policy boundaries.

overview.zh: Twig SSTI 发生在应用把输入拼入 Twig 源码、允许编辑主题模板或动态创建模板时。Twig 版本、SandboxExtension、SecurityPolicy、注册函数和过滤器共同决定表达式能力，普通 `{{ value }}` 数据绑定本身不是漏洞。
overview.en: Twig SSTI occurs when an application concatenates input into Twig source, permits theme-template editing, or creates templates dynamically. Twig version, SandboxExtension, SecurityPolicy, registered functions, and filters determine expression capabilities. Ordinary `{{ value }}` data binding is not a vulnerability.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是模板源码与用户数据边界混淆，同时环境注册了超出业务需要的函数、过滤器、对象方法或文件加载器。历史技巧在新版 Twig 中可能被删除或受限，因此不能仅凭语法被接受推断命令执行，必须结合当前策略和可调用对象。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is mixing template source with user data while exposing functions, filters, object methods, or loaders beyond business need. Historical techniques may be removed or restricted in newer Twig versions, so accepted syntax alone does not imply command execution; the deployed policy and callable objects must be evaluated.

exploitation.zh: 1. 确认输入进入 Twig 源码而非变量，并记录 Twig 主版本和扩展；2. 用常量运算建立求值证据，再检查允许标签、过滤器、函数和属性；3. 在隔离环境运行现有样例并启用/禁用沙箱对照。观察证据是可重复的 Twig 结果或明确 SecurityPolicy 拒绝；PHP 错误页、静态回显和旧版语法报错属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Confirm that input enters Twig source rather than a variable and record the Twig major version and extensions. 2. Establish evaluation with a constant expression, then inspect allowed tags, filters, functions, and properties. 3. Run the existing sample in isolation with sandbox enabled and disabled. Repeatable Twig output or explicit SecurityPolicy denial is evidence; PHP error pages, literal reflection, and obsolete syntax errors are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 只使用受版本控制的固定模板并通过变量传值；2. 对用户可编辑模板启用 SandboxExtension 和最小 SecurityPolicy；3. 删除危险或不必要的函数、过滤器、对象和自定义加载器；4. 升级 Twig，隔离模板缓存并对允许列表和沙箱逃逸路径建立回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Use fixed version-controlled templates and pass values through variables. 2. Enable SandboxExtension with a minimal SecurityPolicy for user-editable templates. 3. Remove dangerous or unnecessary functions, filters, objects, and custom loaders. 4. Update Twig, isolate template caches, and add regression tests for allowlists and sandbox escape paths.

title.zh: 确认 Twig 源码控制点

description.zh: 定位动态模板创建、主题编辑或字符串拼接点，并记录 Twig 版本、扩展和已注册函数。
description.en: Locate dynamic template creation, theme editing, or concatenation and record the Twig version, extensions, and registered functions.

title.zh: 测试 SecurityPolicy 边界

description.zh: 在隔离环境提交现有 Twig 表达式集合，分别记录标签、过滤器、函数和对象属性是否被允许。
description.en: Submit the existing Twig expression set in isolation and record whether tags, filters, functions, and object properties are allowed.

title.zh: 验证结果来源与版本适用性
title.en: Verify result origin and version applicability

description.zh: 用唯一常量、错误表达式和沙箱开关确认结果来自当前 Twig 版本，排除 PHP 通用错误和旧语法噪声。
description.en: Use a unique constant, malformed expression, and sandbox toggle to confirm results come from the deployed Twig version, excluding generic PHP errors and obsolete syntax noise.

title.zh: 最小策略上线后复测
title.en: Retest after applying a minimal policy

description.zh: 固定模板来源、收紧 SecurityPolicy 和已注册能力后复测相同集合，确认业务模板继续工作。
description.en: Fix template sources, restrict SecurityPolicy and registered capabilities, and retest the same set to confirm business templates continue working.

review.rationale: 该条是 Twig 模板表达式输入，应作为 PHP 模板注入 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 用户输入进入 Twig 模板源码，实际 Twig/PHP 版本、SandboxExtension、已注册函数/过滤器和 globals 可核验。
prerequisites.en: User input enters Twig template source, with actual Twig and PHP versions, SandboxExtension, registered functions or filters, and globals verifiable.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离 Twig 环境注册只返回固定 canary 的测试 function/filter，并跟踪编译模板、attribute/filter/function resolution，不访问 app/request 真实对象。
prerequisites.en: An isolated Twig environment registers a test function or filter returning only a fixed canary and traces compiled templates plus attribute, filter, and function resolution without accessing real app or request objects.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标 Twig 将可控表达式编译求值，并访问安全策略外的测试 function/filter 或对象属性产生 canary，模板缓存键与请求关联。 假阳性边界：{{_self}} 字面/正常对象输出、dump 在生产禁用、sandbox 拒绝、未知 filter 错误、app.request 不存在、模板源码显示或开发环境正常 debug 均不是注入 RCE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target Twig engine to compile and evaluate the controlled expression and access a test function, filter, or object attribute outside the intended policy to produce a canary, correlating cache key and request. False-positive boundary: Literal or normal {{_self}} output, dump disabled in production, sandbox denial, unknown-filter errors, missing app.request, template-source display, or legitimate development debugging does not prove injection RCE.

opsecTips.zh: Twig 验证不得 dump 真实 app/request/server、调用系统函数或写模板；出现敏感对象输出、文件/网络副作用、缓存污染或 PHP worker 异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: Twig validation never dumps real app, request, or server objects, calls system functions, or writes templates; stop on sensitive-object output, file or network effects, cache contamination, or PHP-worker anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 移除测试 function/filter/template 与 canary，清空 Twig 编译缓存和 debug 输出，恢复 SandboxExtension 策略并重启 worker。
opsecTips.en: Remove test functions, filters, templates, and canaries, clear Twig compilation caches and debug output, restore SandboxExtension policy, and restart workers.

name.zh: XLSX sharedStrings.xml 外部实体注入

description.zh: 验证服务端表格预览、导入或索引流程在解析 xl/sharedStrings.xml 时是否允许 DTD 和外部实体。
description.en: Verifies whether spreadsheet preview, import, or indexing permits DTDs and external entities while parsing xl/sharedStrings.xml.

overview.zh: XLSX 是由多个 XML 部件组成的 ZIP 包，sharedStrings.xml 保存工作簿共享字符串。风险常在服务端导入、预览、数据抽取或报表转换时触发，并且可能由异步作业处理；Excel 客户端是否打开文件与后端解析器是否存在 XXE 是两件不同的事。
overview.en: XLSX is a ZIP package of XML parts, with sharedStrings.xml holding shared workbook strings. The risk commonly triggers during server-side import, preview, extraction, or report conversion, often in an asynchronous job. Desktop Excel behavior and backend parser XXE are separate concerns.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是表格库或通用 XML 层允许 DTD/外部实体，同时导入进程可访问敏感文件或网络。工作簿关系、命名空间或共享字符串索引不合法也会导致普通解析失败，因此必须使用结构有效的包和无实体对照，不能由一次导入错误确认漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is a spreadsheet library or underlying XML layer that allows DTDs or external entities while the import process can access files or the network. Invalid workbook relationships, namespaces, or shared-string indexes also cause ordinary parse failures, so a structurally valid package and no-entity control are required.

exploitation.zh: 1. 保留合法 workbook 关系和共享字符串索引，仅替换 xl/sharedStrings.xml；2. 在隔离环境触发真实导入或预览并记录作业、解析器和输出；3. 比较有实体、无 DOCTYPE 和不存在资源三组文件。观察证据是受控标记进入单元格/抽取结果或实体访问日志；格式错误、导入拒绝和空工作表属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Preserve valid workbook relationships and shared-string indexes while replacing only xl/sharedStrings.xml. 2. Trigger the real import or preview in isolation and record the job, parser, and output. 3. Compare entity, no-DOCTYPE, and missing-resource files. A controlled marker in cells, extracted output, or entity-access logs is evidence; format errors, import rejection, and empty sheets are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 禁用表格解析栈中的 DTD、外部实体和外部 schema；2. 在无网络、低权限、只读沙箱中执行工作簿导入和转换；3. 校验 OOXML 部件、关系、压缩比、大小和工作表限制；4. 监控作业异常文件访问与外连，并维护恶意 sharedStrings.xml 回归文件。
mitigation.en: 1. Disable DTDs, external entities, and external schemas throughout the spreadsheet parsing stack. 2. Run workbook import and conversion in a low-privilege, no-network, read-only sandbox. 3. Validate OOXML parts, relationships, compression ratio, size, and worksheet limits. 4. Monitor jobs for unusual file access and egress and retain malicious sharedStrings.xml regression files.

title.zh: 确认 XLSX 后端解析动作

description.zh: 识别上传后执行的是数据导入、单元格预览、全文抽取还是格式转换，并记录具体库和任务 ID。
description.en: Identify whether upload triggers data import, cell preview, full-text extraction, or conversion, and record the library and job ID.

title.zh: 提交有效 sharedStrings 样例

description.zh: 在保持工作簿关系有效的前提下运行现有 XLSX XXE 集合，并收集单元格结果和解析日志。
description.en: Run the existing XLSX XXE set while preserving valid workbook relationships and collect cell output and parser logs.

title.zh: 区分实体展开与表格损坏
title.en: Distinguish entity expansion from workbook corruption

description.zh: 使用无 DOCTYPE 和不存在资源的文件对照，只有标记回显或关联实体访问才确认问题。
description.en: Use no-DOCTYPE and missing-resource controls and confirm the issue only when the marker is rendered or entity access is correlated.

title.zh: 修复 XML 层后回归导入
title.en: Regress import after fixing the XML layer

description.zh: 关闭外部实体并隔离导入任务后，以正常和恶意工作簿复测，确认业务导入正常且实体不解析。
description.en: Disable external entities, isolate import jobs, and retest normal and malicious workbooks to confirm business import works without entity resolution.

review.rationale: 原 XLSX 集合混合 sharedStrings 普通实体、Gopher、PHP filter/expect、通用 XML 实体与外部 DTD；另有一条违反 XML 内部子集规则的参数实体声明需退役。
lineDisposition: line 17 -> retire: illegal parameter-entity reference inside an internal-subset markup declaration

prerequisites.zh: 服务端 XLSX 导入、预览或索引流程解包并解析 xl/sharedStrings.xml，XML parser 与共享字符串读取路径已确认。
prerequisites.en: A server-side XLSX import, preview, or indexing flow unpacks and parses xl/sharedStrings.xml, with XML parser and shared-string read path confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: 最小合法 XLSX 只让实体指向导入 worker 沙箱内 marker，并保存 ZIP 成员哈希、任务/工作表 ID、文件审计与单元格输出。
prerequisites.en: A minimal valid XLSX points the entity only to a marker inside the import-worker sandbox and preserves ZIP-member hashes, job or worksheet identifiers, file audit, and cell output.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是解析 sharedStrings.xml 的 worker 读取 marker，并将展开值写入共享字符串表、导入记录或预览单元格，任务链可关联。 假阳性边界：XLSX 上传成功、客户端 Excel 展开、DOCTYPE 存在、导入失败、单元格显示原实体名、路径错误或共享字符串未被工作表引用均不是服务端 XXE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the worker parsing sharedStrings.xml to read the marker and place the expanded value into the shared-string table, imported record, or preview cell, with the job chain correlated. False-positive boundary: Successful XLSX upload, client-side Excel expansion, a present DOCTYPE, import failure, a cell showing the entity name, path errors, or an unreferenced shared string does not prove server-side XXE.

opsecTips.zh: XLSX XXE 只读专用 marker，禁止系统/网络实体和大型工作簿；出现真实文件读取、外连、公式/宏执行、内存增长或队列积压时停止。
opsecTips.en: XLSX XXE reads a dedicated marker only and forbids system or network entities and large workbooks; stop on real-file reads, egress, formula or macro execution, memory growth, or queue backlog.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 XLSX、解包目录、导入记录/预览和 marker，清理表格任务/对象存储/解析缓存并重启隔离 importer。
opsecTips.en: Delete XLSX files, extraction directories, imported records or previews, and markers, clear spreadsheet jobs, object storage, and parser caches, and restart isolated importers.

name.zh: WordPress XML-RPC 方法暴露枚举

description.zh: 用于确认 XML-RPC 端点是否启用、公开哪些方法以及方法调用是否受到认证和最小化配置约束。
description.en: Determines whether an XML-RPC endpoint is enabled, which methods it exposes, and whether calls are constrained by authentication and minimal configuration.

overview.zh: 该条用于识别 WordPress 或兼容服务的 XML-RPC 端点及方法清单。方法存在本身是协议功能，不应直接标记为漏洞；质量判断要结合是否业务需要、是否需要认证、是否暴露高风险方法以及网关和应用的调用限制。
overview.en: This entry identifies an XML-RPC endpoint and its exposed methods on WordPress or compatible services. Method availability is a protocol feature, not automatically a vulnerability. Assessment must consider business need, authentication, high-risk methods, and gateway and application limits.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自不必要的方法暴露、鉴权边界不一致或服务将公开方法与敏感操作绑定。`system.listMethods` 成功只说明可枚举能力，不证明未授权操作；反向代理伪造的 XML 响应、缓存或 WAF 模板也可能造成错误识别。
vulnerability.en: Risk comes from unnecessary method exposure, inconsistent authentication boundaries, or public methods connected to sensitive operations. A successful system.listMethods call proves enumeration only, not unauthorized action. Proxy-generated XML, cache, or WAF templates can also cause misidentification.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录端点基线、响应 Content-Type 和 XML-RPC faultCode；2. 提交现有方法枚举请求并对返回方法按公开、需认证和禁用分类；3. 选取一个只读方法验证认证边界并检查服务日志。观察证据是结构有效且与应用版本一致的方法响应；HTML 错误页、WAF XML 模板和缓存内容属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Record the endpoint baseline, response Content-Type, and XML-RPC faultCode. 2. Submit the existing method-enumeration request and classify returned methods as public, authenticated, or disabled. 3. Use one read-only method to verify the authentication boundary and inspect service logs. A structurally valid method response consistent with the application version is evidence; HTML errors, WAF XML templates, and cached content are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 不需要 XML-RPC 时在应用层关闭端点而不是仅隐藏路径；2. 仅保留业务必需方法并为敏感方法强制认证和授权；3. 对方法调用实施速率限制、请求大小和并发限制；4. 记录方法名、调用主体、faultCode 和异常频率并加入配置回归检查。
mitigation.en: 1. Disable XML-RPC at the application layer when it is not needed rather than merely hiding the path. 2. Keep only required methods and enforce authentication and authorization for sensitive methods. 3. Apply rate, request-size, and concurrency limits. 4. Log method names, principals, fault codes, and unusual frequency and add configuration regression checks.

title.zh: 确认 XML-RPC 协议响应

description.zh: 记录正确和错误 XML 请求的 Content-Type、faultCode 和响应结构，排除普通 HTML 页面。
description.en: Record Content-Type, faultCode, and response structure for valid and malformed XML requests to exclude ordinary HTML pages.

title.zh: 枚举并分类公开方法

description.zh: 运行现有 XML-RPC 方法集合，将结果按公开、需认证、禁用和未知方法分类。
description.en: Run the existing XML-RPC method set and classify results as public, authenticated, disabled, or unknown.
